subject: Conservatives struggle against new liberal orthodoxy
body:
As America becomes more secular and pluralistic, conservatives are fighting a rearguard battle to protect their rights [](http://links.americanxt.com/u/click?_t=45ea7b9dcedb45198104e7ca02a78270&_m=bdacfb3b6d4b41ef86dfab6e4990b90a&_e=8cpdBMNfJoaJ9LQC6p3gQxmYEdxZvoGEq_smgERXBT_jfbQsQo5_pPGzLlQHCdwFGMt6FtUFjBIjQ24KBcJBQUMxajyGdnBRhViO7Z7LyQWmLp054x3WkQHSlcwuhFXiyRdFYTF4CJX_bA8Z4YIZe0LprZhTWRyRd5iGCQ_RwCtc232761qsYWFQuzinBnwDeYHLy1eWh2E4j1ZBXFKLRNKdtFW7latPrHB9OBZ6dYwDYt24fE1l0XgvG9FesWVNf0aMUNIuFAtOit8S3_IuMg%3D%3D) | |
---
**Conservatives struggle against new liberal orthodoxy**

By Bobby Jindal
|
---
As America becomes more secular and pluralistic, conservatives are fighting a rearguard battle to protect their rights to speak, worship, and participate in the public square. Some have suggested that conservatives isolate themselves, promising not to offend if left alone. At the same time, ascendant liberals are seizing the opportunity to consolidate their hold on cultural institutions. They are abandoning commitments to open debate and tolerance for minority viewpoints. History is important in this conversation.

While conservatives proudly proclaimed America’s Judeo-Christian heritage, underlying its unique history and future success, liberals saw the nation’s strength in diversity and the protection of individual rights. Conservatives highlighted the Founding Fathers’ religious beliefs, while liberals emphasized their rejection of divine rule and the enlightenment embrace of reason, natural law, self-evident truths, and universal rights.

Today, however, liberals promote a particular notion of America — one devoted to redistribution to address past grievances based on gender, sexual orientation, and race. Conservatives are left largely alone to fight for neutrality and open debate. Liberals have harnessed universities, media, and popular entertainment to transform America’s culture. Universities have come a long way since Harvard University was founded to train Christian ministers. Professors are more likely to defend Marxism than Christianity, free-market economics, or Western civilization. Liberal bias in education and the media has hardened to intolerance for opposing viewpoints. Ideological diversity and curiosity are often missing in the places they should be nurtured...
_Read more_**[HERE](http://links.americanxt.com/u/click?_t=45ea7b9dcedb45198104e7ca02a78270&_m=bdacfb3b6d4b41ef86dfab6e4990b90a&_e=8cpdBMNfJoaJ9LQC6p3gQ9nhBs3bItc1lYp1miThazXyt7-sXqLJP2xEJOnfUSB2BehxHQyC15_1Tk2jawJMPK1k8oEn-fu3e5xKIN7XVWK90H-X9YZjrt8QNG6Cqx87iHbnIVVHKK8wMS51s_5Jjoeamk-TDUI2E0ZwCc3JLnYum9GpvqhZZONlKaXA2fhWmImfV0USsD7SWA3pJbU-AoxadNZnTokRvOND0cpB0MI886hlgsTRcK8YufNWsW7SPZFKpqaaL_mH8CaUfFvxU7FdOxtaP4bbbNwn8ePYnEhmzyDkXrqR0OroDlHvOCN_0uCGesMbpeSP2FbhJCqMRp_rgH190gtDkoE5VDKIGyY%3D)**.

name: Patrick J. Murphy
subject: Turning PRIDE into ACTION
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Taking The Hill PAC
body:
Peter,

When I [_pushed through the repeal_](https://act.myngp.com/el/ygz_DQRrCYg5fumbjcZwk3VSt9HjsrVceYtENe98wg8=/rdOLOCv9lzmfRNZwaiZo2G_mJVgOFjz_fHoxsnoMLuE=) of the military's "Don't Ask, Don't Tell" policy more than a decade ago, I faced down a lot of misinformation and fear-mongering. Opposition to equality is fierce, but I have found that preparation and resolve in the face of bigotry can be an empowering thing. It's a lesson that I took from the countless LGBTQ+ veterans who I've worked with throughout my career; those who overcome so much hardship just to serve a country that didn't fully accept them for who they are.

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/ygz_DQRrCYg5fumbjcZwk3VSt9HjsrVceYtENe98wg8=/Ub6-qe0BjAIUFmt34zWoeVa-uZaizHFHzV2j9kO0wTw=)
June is Pride Month. It is a time to reflect on the history of the LGBTQ+ community, from Stonewall to Pulse and beyond, and the brave Americans who endured virulent hate just for being who they are. It is also a time to celebrate the progress millions of activists have made to advance LGBTQ+ equality in our country, from military service to marriage equality and more.

[_**But Pride Month must also be a time for action.**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/ygz_DQRrCYg5fumbjcZwk3VSt9HjsrVceYtENe98wg8=/Ub6-qe0BjAIUFmt34zWoeVa-uZaizHFHzV2j9kO0wTw=) For all that has been endured and won, so much still hangs in the balance as extremist legislatures and justices push a radical anti-equality agenda at every opportunity. The integrity of the representatives we elect can be the difference between freedom and oppression for so many in our country.

There are many ways to take action this Pride Month. At [_**Taking the Hill**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/ygz_DQRrCYg5fumbjcZwk3VSt9HjsrVceYtENe98wg8=/Ub6-qe0BjAIUFmt34zWoeVa-uZaizHFHzV2j9kO0wTw=) , we are dedicated to recruiting, supporting, and electing the next generation of veterans and military family members of integrity to Congress from all backgrounds - including our LGBTQ+ friends and family. Our candidates believe in meeting the opponents of equality with preparation and resolve - [_**but they can 't get elected without your help!** We hope you'll support them as, together, we fight to secure full equality for all in our country, for good._](https://act.myngp.com/el/ygz_DQRrCYg5fumbjcZwk3VSt9HjsrVceYtENe98wg8=/Ub6-qe0BjAIUFmt34zWoeVa-uZaizHFHzV2j9kO0wTw=)

Thank you for the support, and Happy Pride Month!

In solidarity,
Patrick

Hon. Patrick J. Murphy
32nd Under Secretary of the Army
Fmr Congressman (PA-01)

To make a contribution, [click here](https://act.myngp.com/el/ygz_DQRrCYg5fumbjcZwk3VSt9HjsrVceYtENe98wg8=/WQeoOD0SZ7xVjx0SQUtQM-WnEC0VfwtPjkKw1qVLntk= "https://act.myngp.com/el/ygz_DQRrCYg5fumbjcZwk3VSt9HjsrVceYtENe98wg8=/WQeoOD0SZ7xVjx0SQUtQM-WnEC0VfwtPjkKw1qVLntk=").
Checks may be mailed to:
Taking the Hill PAC
PO Box 2134
Bristol, PA 19007

name: Terry McAuliffe
subject: Today’s the BIG day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Terry for Virginia
body:
Virginia is voting today.
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30449684/289561609/-2023814932?refcode=20210608_TM_6V_A&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYWVkMzdmOS00OWM4LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LkwdwlYVTODQhv9pHbfvicovgM3xKENQB7Da-b_M5FQ=)

| | It’s primary day, Derek, and voters across the Commonwealth are getting out there and voting!

They’re out there because they know we’re in an extremely competitive election that’s going to decide the fate of Virginia for years to come.

They’re out there because they know that _if we lose,_ Glenn Youngkin will roll back all the progress we’ve made over the last 8 years.

They’re out there because they know that reproductive rights are on the line. That gun safety reform is on the line. That the future of education in Virginia is on the line.

They’re out there because they know Donald Trump is trying to make a comeback, and they’re ready to send anyone carrying his extreme right-wing message packing.

| | Friend - We can’t wait any longer for Congress to protect Americans’ freedom to vote, which is why we need Senators to pass the For The People Act (HR1/S1). With voting rights under attack in 48 out of 50 state legislatures across the country, the moment has never been more urgent, and it will take all of us to ensure that Congress passes the voting rights protections our country and democracy desperately need. No matter where you live—blue state, red state, or somewhere in between—we need to make sure that EVERY U.S. Senator is hearing from their constituents about the urgent need to pass HR1/S1. **Today I’m launching Hot Call Summer— because in order to pass the For The People Act, we need your help to make sure our Senators know how important this legislation is to you.** **Here’s what you can do right now:**
* **No matter where you live, no matter what your Senator has already said, I need you to call your US Senators every day in June to demand that Senators pass the For The People Act to protect our freedom to vote.** Call 888-453-3211 to be connected to your Senators now - and don’t be afraid to call them daily to keep the pressure on.
* **Join Fair Fight Action’s text bank days of action on June 11, 16, 17, 18, 21, 22 and 23 to ask voters in key states to call their Senators about the For The People Act.** If you have not already attended Fair Fight’s text training on our new text platform, Impactive, [sign up for a training here for everything you’ll need to join one of these text banks.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30460087/289586857/-2099015820?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZmRiYmM3Zi02MGM4LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FHIaefG92sHzD40-Q6e2veK-l5-Gn0FlA0wdZh_gzeQ=&emci=9c2ecebf-5bc8-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=5fdbbc7f-60c8-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=1037277)
* **Join me and special guests throughout June for virtual events across the country to share the importance of passing the For The People Act.**

**[Derek, we have been ringing the alarm on Glenn Youngkin’s chances and now, it’s clear elections experts agree. The only way we can stop him is by building the biggest army of grassroots donors Virginia has ever seen -- can you chip in right now to join us?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30461088/289591766/-2023814932?refcode=20210608_538_6AI_B&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MzA4NWEwNC02MmM4LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=q5cXX99DLXZm6tngI_emTOS3lnTWcI92psWcib3UXLs=)**

name: Team Crist
subject: huge numbers
disclaimer_text: Paid for and approved by Charlie Crist, Democrat for Governor |
body:
Thanks to you.

Friend,

It’s been less than a month since Charlie launched his campaign for governor and the reception for our movement has been incredible!

Together, we raised $1.5 million in the month of May. On top of that, early polls show that Charlie is the best positioned candidate to defeat Ron DeSantis next November.

Why?

Because Charlie has the vision, experience, and team behind him to win, and elect a governor that works for all of Florida.

$1.5 million is a huge number, and one we’re incredibly proud of. But it’s important to know that Ron DeSantis will use every trick in the book, along with a massive warchest, to try and stop us.

Campaigns throw out a ton of numbers (ours included!), but Charlie and Team Crist are going to make this about much more than polling, fundraising numbers, and the news of the day.

This will be a campaign of, by, and for all Floridians. That means no person or part of the state will be left behind. It means building a Florida for All.

Thank you again for your support and dedication to our mission!

Team Crist

P.S. Please check out and share our campaign’s latest highlight reel!

DONATE

DONATE

-----------------------------------------------------------------------
| Paid for and approved by Charlie Crist, Democrat for Governor |
-----------------------------------------------------------------------
Charlie Crist for Governor
P.O. Box 1547
St. Petersburg FL 33731 United States

name: The Mississippi Republican Party
subject: It's Election Day! GO VOTE!!!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mississippi Republican Party
body:
Today is Election Day in Mississippi. We need your vote to prevent liberals from winning local elections. | |
---
Fellow Republican,
**Today is Election Day in Mississippi.** We need your vote to prevent liberals from winning local elections. This is one of the most important elections in our lifetimes. _**These races are going to be very close, and we can’t afford to lose.**_

**_EVERY_ _VOTE_ _COUNTS_!**

Polls are open from 7 AM-7 PM. **Please spread the word by forwarding this email along to your conservative friends and family members** , and join us in keeping Mississippi Republican.
[_**Find Your Polling Location >>>**_](http://links.msgop.co/u/click?_t=8490f3f542f84240a99e9ceb9c894519&_m=9d2f70502f6c40598c5d20e72a3cdb49&_e=lMNhfPc0ld9lWjBYzHArKP67niofkSnvflfbXhQbACtFYtpfnSOQEGyKVzREXHGcT53iRuRVnWj0hajT5YrNPtlciZdMaxBVjyV1_EaMapjU3DRiiLuMeR9lNT0wXGr44ct3azZ1Qf9XI1XtATAuiUacJUJ0jrnLkTSKlCqyYLLNaYMU9NwwvrHIMbp2R1H5ynoxpJ1vh3XY5roJlP_XLNrqvWriCDErMOI4aPgNj1Y4gonYOT6y5bbRDMbJ1uVvK6v5dcubckUO0lIZ_YX9A-WXKbZyDHXMCcibdBskB-hoqw28nOLwJMJXou2LlhOQL86Yj1lGsgNsBlclXL96_WNo-1Dl00_OdEbBwctL26w%3D)
The outcome of these local races will have a major impact on every Mississippian and our way of life! We cannot allow liberals to start winning elections in Mississippi and enforce their radical power-hungry agenda on us.

Make no mistake: If they win, Democrats will come after our Second Amendment right to bear arms, our freedom of speech, our religious liberties, AND our hard-earned money through increased taxes.

**We need more loyal patriots like _YOU_ to join us and snuff out Liberals in Mississippi.**
[**_Join Us!_**](http://links.msgop.co/u/click?_t=8490f3f542f84240a99e9ceb9c894519&_m=9d2f70502f6c40598c5d20e72a3cdb49&_e=lMNhfPc0ld9lWjBYzHArKN1XtUfRoBqukk0u8AfW-4tvJ3otcsWCviaK_yOUAtyn8MWhFzADrkfMgFTbnmrRXVBMnBWdA_e5VQ-awC11aq8817oo-YKWXjHwD1wQ7B5Ll9Bq-jPU4esLFqFeVOSV7ctMN4NTc8VVXwKcxFsc8-5xXsUwxTi3qh7aW29sEHysxED0kIb9Ei-dDB2P-6H-amTB-ldT_1HUUzrOemdC8DtpDdZomGGA8OuBEn2HexEYjcn9x5hVqt7splJ1t9YiM976nMXo8aGNYeEDO-azBj4hpbAj0hg-6H53uNZJp7pPrhJWaxjQgZMathoYckKxjZKDRCYHaPHlagoqE-U28cC86x1GYFCK3O6Ve4oYSj8RR6sHf5HHUYeLrS-mtNtpjw%3D%3D)
Thank you,

_**Go Vote! **_

The Mississippi Republican Party
|

name: Cindy Cerquitella
subject: How the Woke took over corporate America
body:
[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c102%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=ya9vSAU8UUqqP7vKW%2bMqng&sysid=1)
It wasn’t through government mandates. It wasn’t by Congress passing a law.
| [ ](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c3998%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ctufrqNz6nL%2bGCJiW5c98w&sysid=1)
---
|
---
Friend,

It wasn’t through government mandates.
It wasn’t by Congress passing a law.
The woke took over corporate America through culture and education.

If you’re sick of it too, I have a solution.

America’s Future (AF) is an organization building a community of young professionals who understand the values of limited government, free speech, and freedom of association.

How are we doing it?
* By training young professionals to get them placed in promising careers.
* By offering mentoring to established professionals.
* By providing nationwide networking opportunities for young conservatives.

I am asking for your immediate support to help us fight back against woke corporate culture. We have a once-in-a-lifetime chance to invest in young conservatives and take back business culture.

[Rush your support today by donating $25, $50, $100, or more today. Click here to donate >>>](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c3999%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=LX0KgiOh2Wup9GSK0DJeLg&sysid=1) [Donate $25 >>>](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c3990%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=rcVl8W0cgjzsFaNPCevKaw&sysid=1)

[Donate $250 >>>](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c3993%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=R%2bPy82GEy7pHi1m9DuakGg&sysid=1)
[Donate $500 >>>](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c3994%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=DW8ZV9E9f0zJd76%2f8P40Fg&sysid=1)

AF uniquely focuses on the emerging years, people in their 20s and 30s. They are developing their lifelong beliefs during this period. We have to win those hearts and minds and AF is fully committed to that effort.”_ \- John Tillman, AF Board of Directors and CEO of Illinois Policy Institute Your support today is needed to help us get up and running with networking events and mentorships in a post-COVID world. I’ll be sure to keep you updated with our first events.

Thank you,

name: Marjorie Taylor Greene
subject: Ban Critical Race Theory
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greene
body:
BAN CRITICAL RACE THEORY - SIGN YOUR PETITION

Peter -- Critical Race Theory is racist and
un-American and should be banned!
Here's just a few of the core tenets of
Critical Race Theory

"America is a white supremacist country."

" Virtually all white people are racist."

"You're racist if you support American
culture."

Hate-America leftists like the woman above
are teaching Critical Race Theory in school districts across the
country, indoctrinating our children with Marxist ideology and
pushing them to hate America.
BAN CRITICAL RACE THEORY - SIGN YOUR PETITION
These same radicals are Joe Biden's handlers
who are ramming Critical Race Theory down the throats of our men
and women in military under the guise of "workplace diversity
training and programs."
But it doesn't stop there.
Critical Race Theory is pervading every
government institution in America and being weaponized against
the American people and American culture.
BAN CRITICAL RACE THEORY - SIGN YOUR PETITION
These radicals have even infiltrated the
Department of Justice, as noted on Tucker Carlson's show, forcing
the FBI to hold weekly Critical Race Theory seminars to
"determine if you're an oppressor or oppressed."
There's even instances where some employees
in the federal government are sent off to a 3-day re-education
camp to "de-construct their white male structure" and forced them
to write letters of apology to women and people of color.
This is disgraceful!
BAN CRITICAL RACE THEORY - SIGN YOUR PETITION

This is happening in Joe Biden's America
right now.
Help me put a stop to this Marxist
infiltration of America. Help me stop these hate-America leftists
from defeating America.
Help me fight back.
Sign your petition to BAN Critical Race
Theory!
After you sign, please chip in $15, $25, $50
-- whatever you can -- to give me the resources to get more
petitions and support.
Lastly, please forward this to every
American-loving Patriot you know and urge them to sign their
petition.
-- Marjorie Taylor Greene
Congresswoman (R-GA)

Paid for by Greene
for Congress

name: Rick Larsen
subject: 🌎 🌊 Sign this petition to protect ocean health and fight climate change
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Citizens to Elect Rick Larsen
body:
|
---
| | _The ocean._ We know that life on this planet would not exist without the ocean. We also know that the ocean is critical to the very functioning of our economy and our communities. After all, over four in ten Americans live in our coastal estuary regions. **We cannot survive without a healthy ocean, and the coastal communities that rely on it day in and day out. And every American, no matter how far inland they live, counts on our ocean and waterways for survival.** And yet, Donald Trump and his allies were willing to do anything to turn a profit—including selling our waters off to the highest bidders, allowing coastal oil drilling, and ignoring the impacts of climate change on our coastal communities. We have already seen President Joe Biden and Democrats in Congress work to begin turning the corner to protect our ocean. Biden rejoined the Paris Climate Agreement. He has also canceled offshore oil drilling plans. He has appointed scientists to critical policy-making roles (replacing Trump's ideological hacks). But there is still a _tremendous_ amount of work to be done. [**Please sign this petition and join me in calling on Congress to take bold action to protect the health of our ocean and coastal communities, promote ocean health and resiliency, spur clean energy research and production, and protect our shorelines from the ravages of climate clean_body: | | | The ocean. We know that life on this planet would not exist without the ocean. We also know that the ocean is critical to the very functioning of our economy and our communities. After all, over four in ten Americans live in our coastal estuary regions. We cannot survive without a healthy ocean, and the coastal communities that rely on it day in and day out. And every American, no matter how far inland they live, counts on our ocean and waterways for survival. And yet, Donald Trump and his allies were willing to do anything to turn a profit—including selling our waters off to the highest bidders, allowing coastal oil drilling, and ignoring the impacts of climate change on our coastal communities. We have already seen President Joe Biden and Democrats in Congress work to begin turning the corner to protect our ocean. Biden rejoined the Paris Climate Agreement. He has also canceled offshore oil drilling plans. He has appointed scientists to critical policy-making roles (replacing Trump's ideological hacks). But there is still a tremendous amount of work to be done. Happy World Ocean Day. body:
Nathan Hochman, has announced an early fundraising haul of half a million dollars in his campaign to unseat Newsom appointee Rob Bonta in 2022. | | | [Peter, to v](https://mailchi.mp/a9a9f6d35417/nathan-hochman-announces-campaign-for-california-attorney-general-4386242?e=94837ebab3)[iew this email in ](https://mailchi.mp/a9a9f6d35417/nathan-hochman-announces-campaign-for-california-attorney-general-4386242?e=94837ebab3)[your](https://mailchi.mp/a9a9f6d35417/nathan-hochman-announces-campaign-for-california-attorney-general-4386242?e=94837ebab3)[ browser](https://mailchi.mp/a9a9f6d35417/nathan-hochman-announces-campaign-for-california-attorney-general-4386242?e=94837ebab3)[, click here.](https://mailchi.mp/a9a9f6d35417/nathan-hochman-announces-campaign-for-california-attorney-general-4386242?e=94837ebab3)
---
| |
---
| | FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE
June 8, 2021
---
Contact: Matt Rexroad
(916) 539-0455
---
| **California Attorney General Candidate Nathan Hochman Hits Critical $500,000 Fundraising Benchmark ** _Hochman, a Republican, Emerges as a Frontrunner to Challenge Newsom Appointee Rob Bonta_
---
| **Los Angeles, CA –** Former US Assistant Attorney General and candidate for California Attorney General, Nathan Hochman, has announced an early fundraising haul of half a million dollars in his campaign to unseat Newsom appointee Rob Bonta in 2022.

_“I am humbled by the generous support we have received from concerned citizens across California,”_ remarked Nathan. _“In the few weeks since announcing this campaign, it has been crystal clear to me that Californians are ready for change in Sacramento and want new leaders who put public safety first.”_

Born and raised in Los Angeles, Nathan graduated from Brown University and earned his law degree from Stanford Law School. After finishing law school, Nathan clerked for a US District Court Judge in Los Angeles before becoming an Assistant US Attorney for the Central District of California. In that capacity, Nathan prosecuted over a hundred cases ranging from public corruption, to narcotics trafficking and gang crimes, to international money laundering and tax evasion, to environmental crimes. In 1994, Nathan spearheaded the Los Angeles Disaster Fraud Task Force, an inter-agency law enforcement team that brought justice to criminals who stole millions of dollars in relief funds in the wake of the Northridge Earthquake.

In 2008, Nathan was appointed by President George W. Bush and confirmed by the US Senate as US Assistant Attorney General overseeing the Department of Justice’s Tax Division. As a defense attorney and partner in two international law firms, Nathan has championed the constitutional rights of individuals and organizations; he has represented victims against those who have harmed them; he has litigated complex civil matters; and he has earned a reputation as one of the nation’s leading criminal justice and tax attorneys.

Nathan is heavily involved in his community. He served as a member and President of the Los Angeles City Ethics Commission from 2011 to 2016 and serves on numerous boards, including those governing the Cedar Sinai Medical Center and American Jewish University.

Nathan launched his campaign for Attorney General at the end of April and has since raised over $500,000—establishing himself as the frontrunner in the race to challenge Gavin Newsom Appointed Attorney General Rob Bonta in the 2022 election.

To learn more about Nathan, visit: [NathanHochman.com](https://axiomstrategies.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=634ddc357d96a36fb118fa25c&id=fb20bafe3a&e=94837ebab3) or follow the campaign on social media @NathanHochmanAG ###

clean_body: Nathan Hochman, has announced an early fundraising haul of half a million dollars in his campaign to unseat Newsom appointee Rob Bonta in 2022. | | | | | | | FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE June 8, 2021 Contact: Matt Rexroad (916) 539-0455 | California Attorney General Candidate Nathan Hochman Hits Critical $500,000 Fundraising Benchmark Hochman, a Republican, Emerges as a Frontrunner to Challenge Newsom Appointee Rob Bonta | Los Angeles, CA – Former US Assistant Attorney General and candidate for California Attorney General, Nathan Hochman, has announced an early fundraising haul of half a million dollars in his campaign to unseat Newsom appointee Rob Bonta in 2022. “I am humbled by the generous support we have received from concerned citizens across California,” remarked Nathan. “In the few weeks since announcing this campaign, it has been crystal clear to me that Californians are ready for change in Sacramento and want new leaders who put public safety first.” Born and raised in Los Angeles, Nathan graduated from Brown University and earned his law degree from Stanford Law School. After finishing law school, Nathan clerked for a US District Court Judge in Los Angeles before becoming an Assistant US Attorney for the Central District of California. In that capacity, Nathan prosecuted over a hundred cases ranging from public corruption, to narcotics trafficking and gang crimes, to international money laundering and tax evasion, to environmental crimes. In 1994, Nathan spearheaded the Los Angeles Disaster Fraud Task Force, an inter-agency law enforcement team that brought justice to criminals who stole millions of dollars in relief funds in the wake of the Northridge Earthquake. In 2008, Nathan was appointed by President George W. Bush and confirmed by the US Senate as US Assistant Attorney General overseeing the Department of Justice’s Tax Division. As a defense attorney and partner in two international law firms, Nathan has championed the constitutional rights of individuals and organizations; he has represented victims against those who have harmed them; he has litigated complex civil matters; and he has earned a reputation as one of the nation’s leading criminal justice and tax attorneys. Nathan is heavily involved in his community. He served as a member and President of the Los Angeles City Ethics Commission from 2011 to 2016 and serves on numerous boards, including those governing the Cedar Sinai Medical Center and American Jewish University. Nathan launched his campaign for Attorney General at the end of April and has since raised over $500,000—establishing himself as the frontrunner in the race to challenge Gavin Newsom Appointed Attorney General Rob Bonta in the 2022 election. To learn more about Nathan, visit: or follow the campaign on social media @NathanHochmanAG ### | | Paid for by Nathan Hochman for Attorney General 2022 FPPC ID 1437955 Want to change how you receive these emails? You can or .

body:
A state that never allowed slaves is taking money from people who never owned slaves and giving it to people who have never been slaves. A state that never allowed slaves is taking money from people who never owned slaves and giving it to people who have never been slaves.

That's right, California has moved forward with reparations plans for African Americans. As a black, conservative female, I find this move to be disturbing - not to mention, unconstitutional!

This is our opportunity as conservatives to bring diversity to the Republican Party and dismantle the racist narrative Democrats have held over conservatives for decades.

I have never asked for a handout and I have never seen myself as a victim because of the color of my skin. **Despite what the Democrats peddle through my minority community, I am a free thinking American who has been blessed with opportunity in this country.**

**If I was a victim like the Democrats thought I was, then I wouldn't be here, running for Congress for a SECOND time with the support of thousands of grassroots conservatives.**

name: Ron Ryckman

body:
I’m Ron Ryckman, Speaker of the Kansas House of Representatives. This year, Republicans in our state’s legislature have accomplished many significant Friend, I’m Ron Ryckman, Speaker of the Kansas House of Representatives. This year, Republicans in our state’s legislature have accomplished many significant wins for Kansas families... But we could have done so much more without Governor Kelly vetoing commonsense policies and obstructing good legislation every opportunity that she got. **This has to change. ** That’s why I’m committed to electing a strong Republican governor in 2022, **and it’s why I’m proud to endorse Derek Schmidt’s campaign to lead our state.** No one is better qualified or more committed than Derek is, and I’m going to work hard to make sure he gets elected. He is unwavering in his commitment to pro-life values, Second Amendment freedoms, and the America First agenda. He is the leader we need for our families, for our businesses, and for our future. [**Will you help me flip Kansas RED in 2022 by chipping in a few dollars to Derek’s campaign HERE**](http://links.schmidtforkansas.com/u/click?_t=4eb8bd5dcca54a0b993a2eb1eb42ba73&_m=2f3a777120554ff7bd8f020028ae150e&_e=R_Jcekw2CzN3Kd3qhEGOO7BKgBWAJ4xom4QiClmGBr5n3cKb5PQUXp24qQZVjGl660JlB7y4WC_5e6Z5FyrUcw1LzzoZOe0sG2ZA4tEKKzoH22Z0Xilnn67QkLYFskKcq_YqJSXXVG1CEnCEOQAvcjYuOD14Lz7yWdzGUylwAOuLrs4WRw0utG5RbT1TlIfMeY4Dh3iyEGMUHN9XNfs5DebNxL2ZH_dw6CwZA0PS343wpon8sjqICiMIi7sP89SB1sXDFrDhimlfIUMEU3mEWo3dIGzgVxKTOkyrFeqoB92feFeYMAomxjcr_tG5GNNeBgOvsLGAOinn1KTb78VOTZjclZb4N6kkqXMXIo7g1e-kX0BnMemxQqG29RgxA0yVBlFtKLXaRT1n70UPAEl2_uTYTaclSlrmCQjyVRv8gGLwBI22ZRW4LNt2g5AMTKO2VHTpj4yQeP8IqRPp3MtE8g%3D%3D) As Speaker of the House for the past five years, I’ve worked closely with every single major candidate for governor. To me, the choice is crystal clear: **Derek Schmidt is the best possible choice to bring strong leadership and real Kansas values back to Topeka.** As our attorney general, Derek has always been a trusted conservative leader for Kansas. He has stood strong against the overreach of the Obama Administration, the Biden Administration, and the Kelly Administration. Both publicly and privately, Derek has been a reliable conservative voice who listens and gets things done in state government. clean_body: I’m Ron Ryckman, Speaker of the Kansas House of Representatives. This year, Republicans in our state’s legislature have accomplished many significant Friend, I’m Ron Ryckman, Speaker of the Kansas House of Representatives. This year, Republicans in our state’s legislature have accomplished many significant wins for Kansas families... But we could have done so much more without Governor Kelly vetoing commonsense policies and obstructing good legislation every opportunity that she got. This has to change. That’s why I’m committed to electing a strong Republican governor in 2022, and it’s why I’m proud to endorse Derek Schmidt’s campaign to lead our state. No one is better qualified or more committed than Derek is, and I’m going to work hard to make sure he gets elected. He is unwavering in his commitment to pro-life values, Second Amendment freedoms, and the America First agenda. He is the leader we need for our families, for our businesses, and for our future. As Speaker of the House for the past five years, I’ve worked closely with every single major candidate for governor. To me, the choice is crystal clear: Derek Schmidt is the best possible choice to bring strong leadership and real Kansas values back to Topeka. As our attorney general, Derek has always been a trusted conservative leader for Kansas. He has stood strong against the overreach of the Obama Administration, the Biden Administration, and the Kelly Administration. Both publicly and privately, Derek has been a reliable conservative voice who listens and gets things done in state government. I know that he has the values and the backbone to stand up for what’s right. It’s time to turn the page on the disappointments of the past few years and for Republicans to move forward together so we can take the veto pen away from Laura Kelly. Will you join me in doing so? Thank you for joining me in coming together to support Derek Schmidt for governor. Sincerely, Ron Ryckman Speaker of the Kansas House of Representatives | | | PAID FOR BY DEREK SCHMIDT FOR KANSAS, INC., KELLY ARNOLD, TREASURER.

As a daughter of an immigrant, a single mother who survived on Medicaid and earned my college degree online while working a full-time job, I know the struggles that so many Virginians have faced.
For too long, our government hasn’t worked for working families like mine. It’s allowed the rich to get richer while those below the poverty line stay there. It’s permitted dangerous leaders like Donald Trump to fan the flames of white supremacy and racism. And it’s kept too many Americans from having a seat at the table.
Well, I’ve had enough. I’m pulling my chair up to this table and demanding a system that works for all Virginians — and I’m asking you to join me.
As Lt. Governor, I'll ensure we continue our progress by further expanding Medicaid, lowering prescription drug prices, and ensuring that every Virginian has access to care no matter their zip code — but first, we need to win today’s primary.
**Will you pitch in and help our team get out the vote in the final hours before polls close? Anything you can give will make a difference.**

>
> Derek, this is a crisis. Glenn Youngkin is an extreme right-winger with unlimited resources and the backing of Donald Trump. We urgently need our grassroots team to step up so we don’t fall further behind.
>
> **[Can you pitch in right now to help us keep pace with Glenn Youngkin? name: Deandrea Newsome
subject: Campaign update for you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Erica Smith for US Senate 2022
body:
I’m gonna show you some exclusive photos from the first weekend of Erica’s incredibly ambitious 100 Counties Tour.
#
Hey, it’s Deandrea with a campaign update from the road!
I’m gonna show you some exclusive photos from the first weekend of Erica’s incredibly ambitious 100 Counties Tour.
But first, I have to ask: [**_Can you please make your very first donation to Erica Smith for U.S. Senate so we have enough money to fully fund the rest of our tour?_**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/2355?refcode=em20210608-150&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=150%2E3698%2E2X3FOb)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/2355?refcode=em20210608-150&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=150%2E3698%2E2X3FOb)**
Our 100 Counties Tour is our campaign’s first-ever statewide tour, and a critical opportunity to connect with North Carolina voters in every single county.
This past weekend, we hit up Mecklenburg, Durham, Wake, and Pasquotank counties. **For this leg of the tour, we were joined by a very special guest: Activist and former candidate for LA-02, Gary Chambers!**
[](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/2355?refcode=em20210608-150&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=150%2E3698%2E2X3FOb)
Erica made sure to greet every supporter at each stop. Just like Erica always says, our campaign is about leaving no one behind and showing up everywhere.
With Gary by our side, Erica had honest conversations about the urgent changes needed in North Carolina — from Medicare for All, to universal rural broadband, to a Green New Deal.
[](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/2355?refcode=em20210608-150&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=150%2E3698%2E2X3FOb)
It was terrific getting to meet so many North Carolina voters. **There was so much energy on the ground this weekend, y'all!** As a life-long North Carolina voter, let me tell you: We are tired of the status quo, tired of the Democratic establishment, and tired of moderate white men making all the decisions for our state.
[](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/2355?refcode=em20210608-150&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=5&akid=150%2E3698%2E2X3FOb)
It’s time for more representation in the U.S. Senate, and a leader who will truly represent ALL of us. It’s time for ERICA SMITH!
**But the honest-to-goodness truth is that our campaign needs your support, especially since we’re only four counties deep into our 100 Counties Tour.**
[**_Will you please donate $5 or more to our campaign? In order to visit the remaining 96 counties on our tour, it’s essential that we raise enough money online through emails like this one._**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/2355?refcode=em20210608-150&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=6&akid=150%2E3698%2E2X3FOb)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/2355?refcode=em20210608-150&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=25&akid=150%2E3698%2E2X3FOb)**
Thanks so much for your support. More soon,
Deandrea
Deandrea Newsome
Campaign Chair
Erica Smith for U.S. Senate

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-emails?refcode=em20210608-150-footer&t=26&refcode2=150_3698_2X3FOb&akid=150%2E3698%2E2X3FOb)**
---
Email us: [info@ericaforus.com](mailto: info@ericaforus.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Grassroots donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Erica for Us, P.O. Box 1236, Gaston, NC 27832.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=27&akid=150%2E3698%2E2X3FOb)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ericaforus.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=28&akid=150%2E3698%2E2X3FOb)

Paid for by Erica Smith for US Senate 2022

body:
| | | Taking a quick break from door knocking to connect with you. I just got a call from my field team and we are running low on flyers at our voting locations. I’m sending someone to the printer within the next few hours to get some more.

However, we are currently spending down to zero so we don’t have the resources for this last minute print. Any chance you can chip in?

Here’s a link. We are hoping to raise about $1,500 to cover the printing.

**[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jcf_final_stretch](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yup46hgIDruXQ6AHBBlG3o373ZGsaUSVi20dxJo4nG_bMDXQiIaTjyDBxcNRzDwmGxGJRJX-i3X2-d7_edTQhVY2j27VX6X_k5ge2Jw2jWzri_ZqKveZ0O1__ppEuSHQcAUn2ZOG__YJOwuFEldX2E8IouDsg5afHrF-X6JMopgLByLaKQvfMprt8iYVyFXMsOui7Ndfyj0526WH-NeD8GI3wA27U_5ugzZYWULDeJSSxv-QpxpEeU7OcUUDimAhRWDClVwcRHlJgpYoNSalz-PWyMh3F8TSsDqRadWFxnlXnWtdoyl0m42s_mCDvxJisWJOrJ7IxSlZMUpHq_gjXi/3cl/FKKcKCIESlemHovSHvY2dA/h0/My3C9ZjF_rVaoTD8NJSHshmz3dxWDgop1pMpgSnx3kY)**

Thanks,

Jennifer

* * *
_Jennifer Carroll Foy was born and raised in Petersburg. In 2017, she flipped a Republican district as a first-time candidate pregnant with twins. During her time as Delegate, Jennifer championed the ratification of the Equal Rights Amendment, helped expand Medicaid to 400,000 Virginians, and advocated for the Commonwealth’s most vulnerable communities.

She has a career of public service and it started long before 2017. As a public defender, Jennifer helped give a voice to the often voiceless — children, people suffering from addiction, those experiencing homelessness, those with mental illness, and the poor.

Now she’s running to be the first woman elected Governor of Virginia and serve as the first Black woman to be governor nationwide. **[Help her make history. That's why she wants to hear from you. | | While Republican super PACs are funneling dark money into our state in an attempt to buy this seat, we're remaining focused on you, friend. Thank you for your help. – Team Maggie | = | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Maggie for NH PO Box 298 Concord, NH 03302 United States To receive fewer emails, click Contributions or gifts to Maggie for NH are not tax deductible. | | Paid for by Maggie for NH

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: Merrick Garland’s investigation of Louis DeJoy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | **CNN: DOJ investigating Postmaster General Louis DeJoy** Peter, Louis DeJoy can't help himself. First, DeJoy intentionally tried to make it easier for his partner-in-crime, Donald Trump, to walk to reelection by manufacturing postal delays and backlogs to keep predominantly Democratic ballots from being counted. Now, Merrick Garland and the Justice Department are investigating DeJoy, not for his previous crime, but for breaking federal campaign finance laws to benefit Donald Trump and other Republicans. | **[FIRE DEJOY](https://click.everyaction.com/k/30474166/289645473/-1699842291?refcode=OUT_20210608_GEN_FDR_E&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg3NzQxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjI0MjljYTg5LTg3YzgtZWIxMS1hN2FkLTUwMWFjNTdiOGZhNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=QdWafv_QUXeAqv-OIhw2jirxup7ao1OcFiE7qMfrun0=)**
---

DeJoy is brazen in his illegal efforts to help elect his GOP allies. And it's clear that someone so accustomed to breaking the law cannot serve another day in our government. That's why we're calling on Joe Biden to take action.

**DeJoy knows he's untouchable.** The only one who can fire Louis DeJoy is the Trump-appointed USPS Board of Governors. And it will take a groundswell of grassroots pressure to call for his ousting and hold him accountable for his crimes.

**[The solution is right in front of us. We're calling on our grassroots army to persuade Joe Biden to fire every single one of these Trump-appointed governors and create a board that will fight for the USPS and fire Louis DeJoy. But a national campaign like that requires resources, and Democrats are starting to take DeJoy at his word that he's bulletproof. So we're counting on you. Can we step up today and chip in to help our grassroots campaign?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/30474167/289645474/-1699842291?refcode=OUT_20210608_GEN_FDR_E&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg3NzQxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjI0MjljYTg5LTg3YzgtZWIxMS1hN2FkLTUwMWFjNTdiOGZhNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=QdWafv_QUXeAqv-OIhw2jirxup7ao1OcFiE7qMfrun0=)**

name: Team Cammack
subject: We need to talk about China
body:
Kat recently penned an article in the Washington Examiner about America’s reliance on China throughout the COVID-19 pandemic.
---
| | | | | | [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0016Oxlyvcxjn2FZ1an6VWJ1CeZoi8AMn9CAr7wsOw7yMISE-n7WL9nvRQQWk3l0hA8dYR1_a5MN1DnTMYWIV3o6niIy-MUAFeFhzsEsq6eqZZTs6RrWhmVzCF-eY0VNP-b692JrLr9ow9e4fVnkcWNTiLKDWvTsmz8-n99HIW7uy7Y56GVogRkTqqxc5m_qLjT-jpqFl_LQp8=&c=UqxAW4PGPrqzQ-81tZigsbXzqrOiSzIrtnWEkUwD3szDE6Iq7cqFuA==&ch=xU1Prf7a0RGw4mI_bEgH_ZbiqLwwKalO49RhibVANpX6emPHi0l3XA==&jrc=1)
---
| Friend,
Kat recently penned an article in the Washington Examiner about America's reliance on China throughout the COVID-19 pandemic. Our nation is far too dependent on China for both low- and high-tech goods, and as we realized during the pandemic-- our supply chain for even basic goods is weak.
This is why Kat introduced legislation to have the Department of Homeland Security investigate whether our current supply chains are a threat or could be a threat to our national security.
---
| | | [READ THE ARTICLE](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0016Oxlyvcxjn2FZ1an6VWJ1CeZoi8AMn9CAr7wsOw7yMISE-n7WL9nvRQQWk3l0hA8RG6fIAdzOffxSOUKGa4y_iKqLqUPpvWI7D_JEsa7t7dvKYWgM7hYPhTPJFp-56KDgqP90e4kdEQDFtZZ2lwrgurLKmXAPZc7gbFXFfIXeNyRRshCHHZMc7DEBgH0nW0vqznnh6w0rAYEar1A4ykdZ7A0z0KuWdUPQKGvXNHWN79OsABRS1hOnIWZVaVqM9mTL-3wEh-tX7qHnJqx00PovOE2CTyyemmColBzGiDXGw1ctBTT634onJ9QkqO_FKe2awFlIUL-UuePA6na4IDmuFIWAJOmmE47FGJU4oyPZy8=&c=UqxAW4PGPrqzQ-81tZigsbXzqrOiSzIrtnWEkUwD3szDE6Iq7cqFuA==&ch=xU1Prf7a0RGw4mI_bEgH_ZbiqLwwKalO49RhibVANpX6emPHi0l3XA==&jrc=1)
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0016Oxlyvcxjn2FZ1an6VWJ1CeZoi8AMn9CAr7wsOw7yMISE-n7WL9nvRQQWk3l0hA8RG6fIAdzOffxSOUKGa4y_iKqLqUPpvWI7D_JEsa7t7dvKYWgM7hYPhTPJFp-56KDgqP90e4kdEQDFtZZ2lwrgurLKmXAPZc7gbFXFfIXeNyRRshCHHZMc7DEBgH0nW0vqznnh6w0rAYEar1A4ykdZ7A0z0KuWdUPQKGvXNHWN79OsABRS1hOnIWZVaVqM9mTL-3wEh-tX7qHnJqx00PovOE2CTyyemmColBzGiDXGw1ctBTT634onJ9QkqO_FKe2awFlIUL-UuePA6na4IDmuFIWAJOmmE47FGJU4oyPZy8=&c=UqxAW4PGPrqzQ-81tZigsbXzqrOiSzIrtnWEkUwD3szDE6Iq7cqFuA==&ch=xU1Prf7a0RGw4mI_bEgH_ZbiqLwwKalO49RhibVANpX6emPHi0l3XA==&jrc=1)
---
| We have to understand that China does not share our interests, and they are our competitors. That means America's losses are China's victories. It is critical that we understand partnerships, financial transactions, and business acquisitions by the Chinese that could be a potential threat in the future.
Like Kat says, "China is playing the long game. We need to play the long game, too."
It is absolutely critical that we gain control of our supply chains and put America First. We cannot depend on a competitor for our most necessary and precious resources the next time a pandemic finds its way into our country.
Can I count on your support to put America First and make sure our supply chains are independent of China?
---

clean_body: Kat recently penned an article in the Washington Examiner about America’s reliance on China throughout the COVID-19 pandemic. | | | | | | | Friend, Kat recently penned an article in the Washington Examiner about America's reliance on China throughout the COVID-19 pandemic. Our nation is far too dependent on China for both low- and high-tech goods, and as we realized during the pandemic-- our supply chain for even basic goods is weak. This is why Kat introduced legislation to have the Department of Homeland Security investigate whether our current supply chains are a threat or could be a threat to our national security. | | | | | We have to understand that China does not share our interests, and they are our competitors. That means America's losses are China's victories. It is critical that we understand partnerships, financial transactions, and business acquisitions by the Chinese that could be a potential threat in the future. Like Kat says, "China is playing the long game. We need to play the long game, too." It is absolutely critical that we gain control of our supply chains and put America First. We cannot depend on a competitor for our most necessary and precious resources the next time a pandemic finds its way into our country. Can I count on your support to put America First and make sure our supply chains are independent of China? | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | For Florida, Team Cammack | | | | | | | Kat for Congress | 5200 NW 43rd Street, Suite 102-180, Gainesville, FL 32606 | | Sent by mailto:info@katforcongress.com

name: Giffords.org
subject: Gabby’s birthday is today!
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
#

**_TODAY IS GABBY’S BIRTHDAY!_**
**[SIGN HER CARD](https://go.giffords.org/signup/gabby_bday_card?source=em210608-1-15&t=1&akid=203%2E3935704%2Erthwhp)**

* * *
Friends - today is Gabby’s birthday!
You know Gabby, she’s out there every day, working hard and showing us what courage looks like.
So much of what we’ve been able to accomplish as a movement over the past years is thanks to her tireless effort. And it hasn’t been easy — especially while continuing her own personal recovery.
So we created an online card where supporters can add their names and leave her a note. It would mean a lot to have your name on it. What do you say?
[**Click here to sign Gabby’s birthday card and leave her a personal message. She’s going to be so happy to read all of your kind messages, so don’t miss out – sign the card today!**](https://go.giffords.org/signup/gabby_bday_card?source=em210608-1-15&t=2&akid=203%2E3935704%2Erthwhp)
[](https://go.giffords.org/signup/gabby_bday_card?source=em210608-1-15&t=3&akid=203%2E3935704%2Erthwhp)
One of the great lessons from Gabby's recovery is that each day is a gift and every additional year a blessing.
Thank you so much for being a part of Gabby’s big day!
Team Giffords

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=203%2E3935704%2Erthwhp) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and Mark.

Hey there, Since launching his exploratory committee, Mike made it clear that he will not take any voter for granted in his fight to restore integrity and compassion to the state office. The truth is, it’s going to take a true grassroots movement powered by Texans like you to take on the powerful interests, big-money donors, and the Texas GOP machine hell-bent on setting us back decades in time. In the next few months, our team will take a hard look at what we’ve raised and do the math to see if Mike has the resources to run against Dan Patrick for Lieutenant Governor. A state that never allowed slaves is taking money from people who never owned slaves and giving it to people who have never been slaves. | [](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=13b6cba9ab2848c0b8fd94663d590782&_e=AIF69Wx2ON3Ox6IFq2X2xXm9BoE6kV2jXvkAjzEhYYNWCfwzYAvAn7u8AlUSnfXS_UfaQaPv9rar8YznB8bVQpM2Fsf6lXRlbhJj8uQyTYYwDom_76gu1uSaZ7Q0Ay3ZsXRViJ7Cho9nzMBzQ6ISqr4fD0wpBlxkH-sUTGKfOL_5_mjfOaAK7Z7FPqa9vGVt2FWfe959LDv42DHMOjz87ynU3MY9jQuN0gOmLzL41NXV98_Y83av16TC6KymToDh_eGec2fF36Ll_rp4KaipyjSN31ArroQYzuE02xEftgcFO5avC2W6LgWhss6QFtdTnIO_obiMkAzz39O9WYjSfmYCZo4k1XI0cPNQw6Me6N0Rl43hF-HHUGpOOOWYredXySkLORsnaJLNo5Po8kX3aK3b74Jbmgmk-loDD4HzZYb_X7RW1ZnwuaCFZYwaZuRF)
Get this, Peter...

A state that never allowed slaves is taking money from people who never owned slaves and giving it to people who have never been slaves.

That's right, California has moved forward with reparations plans for African Americans. As a black, conservative female, I find this move to be disturbing - not to mention, unconstitutional!

**Reparations divide our country. Opportunity brings us together.**

[**That's why I hope you will support my campaign to become the FIRST black female Republican elected to the House from the state of California right now by joining my team.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=13b6cba9ab2848c0b8fd94663d590782&_e=AIF69Wx2ON3Ox6IFq2X2xXm9BoE6kV2jXvkAjzEhYYNWCfwzYAvAn7u8AlUSnfXS_UfaQaPv9rar8YznB8bVQpM2Fsf6lXRlbhJj8uQyTYYwDom_76gu1uSaZ7Q0Ay3ZsXRViJ7Cho9nzMBzQ6ISqr4fD0wpBlxkH-sUTGKfOL_5_mjfOaAK7Z7FPqa9vGVt2FWfe959LDv42DHMOjz87ynU3MY9jQuN0gOmLzL41NWX60wg3tU8Hx38u7NHLFIihPciLz6R4_NgtQcoyT8gVJm76pU7Cz6Lnj7gwO8VAuTfI7kauO7bt0inCgmMIjCksro7gSAxupXON59jae_2MtCWtl2BPOlj-FHJ2uk9VWAH-nqGPBHo3dT-4y7NLIyuk2aj61vUhfLKnmDzatuPB3O0_7dmNbtRsT0GkBJLx4xtqUvSdS2aYcFlNrMq9NZ6)

This is our opportunity as conservatives to bring diversity to the Republican Party and dismantle the racist narrative Democrats have held over conservatives for decades.

I have never asked for a handout and I have never seen myself as a victim because of the color of my skin. **Despite what the Democrats peddle through my minority community, I am a free thinking American who has been blessed with opportunity in this country.**

**If I was a victim like the Democrats thought I was, then I wouldn't be here, running for Congress for a SECOND time with the support of thousands of grassroots conservatives.**

[**So today, I am asking you to make a donation of $5 or more to my campaign to help me win in 2022.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=13b6cba9ab2848c0b8fd94663d590782&_e=AIF69Wx2ON3Ox6IFq2X2xXm9BoE6kV2jXvkAjzEhYYNWCfwzYAvAn7u8AlUSnfXS_UfaQaPv9rar8YznB8bVQpM2Fsf6lXRlbhJj8uQyTYYwDom_76gu1uSaZ7Q0Ay3ZsXRViJ7Cho9nzMBzQ6ISqr4fD0wpBlxkH-sUTGKfOL_5_mjfOaAK7Z7FPqa9vGVt2FWfe959LDv42DHMOjz87ynU3MY9jQuN0gOmLzL41NUZm7ojMKY79LzYMGVzhsJ1DzVA5rhMKYNJrQTpphLZ7kuAPqAqKN0x1bfSPTYDGt5XP5HTm8gQW7aGJtmdpTMNGqn7BX466JrfrhmKjjm9inGwM7Kx3gP-TYED-D9uvbJDtPIBYPvnIDMj-DbcDGutwkP1bYBe9YwrmEg2CAPZeSxXw7fK9FPBs9_2Lh7giKlGlWHk-aWVCRw-9XgaNR6f) With your help, I can change the narrative and prove that all black Americans need in this country is opportunity, NOT reparations!

clean_body: A state that never allowed slaves is taking money from people who never owned slaves and giving it to people who have never been slaves. A state that never allowed slaves is taking money from people who never owned slaves and giving it to people who have never been slaves. | Get this, Peter... A state that never allowed slaves is taking money from people who never owned slaves and giving it to people who have never been slaves. That's right, California has moved forward with reparations plans for African Americans. As a black, conservative female, I find this move to be disturbing - not to mention, unconstitutional! Reparations divide our country. Opportunity brings us together. This is our opportunity as conservatives to bring diversity to the Republican Party and dismantle the racist narrative Democrats have held over conservatives for decades. I have never asked for a handout and I have never seen myself as a victim because of the color of my skin. Despite what the Democrats peddle through my minority community, I am a free thinking American who has been blessed with opportunity in this country. If I was a victim like the Democrats thought I was, then I wouldn't be here, running for Congress for a SECOND time with the support of thousands of grassroots conservatives. With your help, I can change the narrative and prove that all black Americans need in this country is opportunity, NOT reparations! Thank you and God Bless, Aja Smith United States Air Force Veteran Republican for Congress | Aja is a United States Air Force veteran. She was deployed to Qatar in 2007, where she proudly participated in Operation Enduring Freedom. ---|--- | | ---|---|--- Aja Smith is a retired member of the United States Air Force. name: Laura Loomer
subject: Trending on Twitter
body:
As soon as the video got out of me confronting Jack Dorsey at the BitCoin 2021 Conference in Miami, Florida, I was trending on Twitter.
| | | | [](https://deploy.libersend.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/zorkX5b763pZweK3DRY0ESxw/8892QGYJayieIZA34kJ763rXqg) | Patriot,

[](https://deploy.libersend.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/zorkX5b763pZweK3DRY0ESxw/8892QGYJayieIZA34kJ763rXqg) As soon as the video got out of me confronting Jack Dorsey at the BitCoin 2021 Conference in Miami, Florida, I was trending on Twitter.

EVERYONE can see the hypocrisy in the actions of the Big Tech Mafia.

Twitter's CEO was whining that his app was recently banned in Nigeria . . . calling it a "human rights violation" to stop Nigerans from accessing Twitter.

But back home, Jack and his socialist tech crew maintain their war against conservative speech . . . denying MILLIONS of Americans access to this so-called "human right."

**Let 's keep fighting!**
[**Back my lawsuit against the Big Tech Mafia here.**](https://deploy.libersend.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/zorkX5b763pZweK3DRY0ESxw/8892QGYJayieIZA34kJ763rXqg)
We've already succeeded in passing a state law that will fine Big Tech up to **$250,000 A DAY** for censoring candidates for office in Florida.

Now we need to end Cancel Culture for good by winning this lawsuit that could apply MASSIVE punitive damages and set the stage for all other "banned" Americans to do the same.

Supreme Court Justice Clarence Thomas recently weighed in on one of my cases, expressing in his dissent his concern over, "the concentrated control of so much speech in the hands of a few private parties."

He's right. Everyone knows it, and it's just a matter of time before the Big Tech Mafia is held accountable and forced to reverse their policies of discrimination against conservatives.

**By the end of the month, I have to raise $42,000 to keep this critical lawsuit going.**

[**Can you chip in? Any amount helps and together we can chip away at this big goal.**](https://deploy.libersend.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/zorkX5b763pZweK3DRY0ESxw/8892QGYJayieIZA34kJ763rXqg)

Thanks again for all that you do.

Keep fighting!

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer

---

LAKE WORTH, FL. 33460

_Jennifer Carroll Foy was born and raised in Petersburg. In 2017, she flipped a Republican district as a first-time candidate pregnant with twins. During her time as Delegate, Jennifer championed the ratification of the Equal Rights Amendment, helped expand Medicaid to 400,000 Virginians, and advocated for the Commonwealth’s most vulnerable communities.

She has a career of public service and it started long before 2017. As a public defender, Jennifer helped give a voice to the often voiceless — children, people suffering from addiction, those experiencing homelessness, those with mental illness, and the poor.

Now she’s running to be the first woman elected Governor of Virginia and serve as the first Black woman to be governor nationwide. **[Help her make history. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30479095/289665720/-1233952322?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MzVmNTUzMS05OWM4LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LIcduZrHXvREmP_mIuZETgtlfsBs3cRDo6cVCgJU5tE=&emci=96be5f1c-94c8-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=535f5531-99c8-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=18185356)

| | Today is World Ocean Day, Peter. So let's talk about fracking. Yes, fracking: the poisonous, destructive process of pulling natural gas out of inland bedrock. Fracking doesn't just poison groundwater and set off earthquakes. It also leads to the creation of dangerous plastics that end up – you guessed it – in the ocean. That means everything from:
* microplastics, tiny beads that sea creatures consume and that eventually end up in our bodies for decades, to
* the Great Pacific Garbage Patch, a massive island of garbage in the north Pacific that's nearly double the size of Texas and triple the size of France, to
* the _millions of pounds _of fishing gear (that surprised me, too) abandoned in the ocean each year, and more.

Our ocean is our greatest asset in the fight against climate change, Peter, pulling a massive amount of heat and carbon out of the atmosphere each year. But thanks to our nation's addiction to oil, plastic, and yes, fracking, we're not only destroying the climate, but destroying our best tool to save it. Today, on World Ocean Day, I'm asking our movement not just to reduce, reuse, and recycle, but to **_remove _politicians who won't pledge to oppose all fracking efforts.** The cycle of environmental destruction has gone on too long, Peter. It never should have started. body:
---
| | | | | | [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0013VzsMX1JBi5MTmd0cAVZxE6RaXAec0OjPKkn2kcMQYn_4FO9LEORXzYsjf-BZOKRSNLCW-iuZHYpf3dFK-cMgN8n1AendGvCCk2rOSLn66_zHNfpOxJcUXP-d_ua1TjbpO5HweIag72LRGZr8H8umR8Dh4Qh_z6a7lIlE8c1cPQ=&c=ANPqNI_4D2hqnxmdzsX_e4Wcl4CEALuRE8vzbzky0HiOXqpBDXm6fA==&ch=vFEvX0Tw2nLHfe9VEQyqRlynZyqSNsRI5vrQGTpDWrGb_mDnJChcGQ==&jrc=1)

| Peter,
Americans will not be duped into trading mask mandates for vaccine mandates!
To prevent this from becoming a reality, I just introduced a bill to ban vaccine passports in America \- the federal government has no business asking Americans for their vaccination status, and they should not have the ability to use our tax dollars to support third parties who do.
Let's not allow the public health bureaucracy - led by the manipulative Dr. Fauci \- to become the next entity that drains our liberty away in the United States of America.
---
| | | [SUPPORT MY BILL TO BAN VACCINE PASSPORTS](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0013VzsMX1JBi5MTmd0cAVZxE6RaXAec0OjPKkn2kcMQYn_4FO9LEORXzYsjf-BZOKRSNLCW-iuZHYpf3dFK-cMgN8n1AendGvCCk2rOSLn66_zHNfpOxJcUXP-d_ua1TjbpO5HweIag72LRGZr8H8umR8Dh4Qh_z6a7lIlE8c1cPQ=&c=ANPqNI_4D2hqnxmdzsX_e4Wcl4CEALuRE8vzbzky0HiOXqpBDXm6fA==&ch=vFEvX0Tw2nLHfe9VEQyqRlynZyqSNsRI5vrQGTpDWrGb_mDnJChcGQ==&jrc=1)

| The only action that should stem from the tragedies of the past year is holding the Chinese Communist Party and other responsible participants accountable.
But the power-hungry leftists want to use the pandemic as an excuse to target our privacy and civil liberties!
Apparently, we are to believe that the same federal government that brazenly targeted President Trump and threw open our Southern Border is to be trusted with our private health information...

body:
If we’re going to roll out our new ads introducing Sen. Street to Pennsylvania voters, we must have the money in the bank by midnight tonight. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30481573/289673817/902632477?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84MzEwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YTllNjAxNC1hMWM4LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RKtask3d0G0dxW5MOywzd7F4xQVOYSBDe6vp7AqKACU=&emci=86a8c246-9fc8-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=7a9e6014-a1c8-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=15053672) | Yesterday, the Philadelphia Juneteenth Family Inc. hosted a Juneteenth Flag-Raising Ceremony outside City Hall to kick off our Juneteenth celebrations. My friend, City Councilmember Kenyatta Johnson, read General Order No. 3 to the crowd -- the same historic order read to those still enslaved in Texas on June 19, 1865, two years after other enslaved people in the South had already been set free. **I’m proud to do my part by submitting a memorandum to the Pennsylvania Senate about recognizing June 19, Juneteenth, as a holiday in Pennsylvania.** Juneteenth marks the day in which the last enslaved people in Galveston, Texas were informed of the Emancipation Proclamation and the true mark of the end of slavery in the United States. Juneteenth is also one of the oldest African-American holidays, and this celebration of Black culture and Black joy ought to be recognized here in Pennsylvania in an official capacity. As we wrote in our memorandum: _“The holiday seeks to proliferate the ideas of self-improvement, the celebration of African culture, and the respect for all cultures. This day of pride is incredibly significant to many Pennsylvanians, and as such, it deserves to be recognized in the Commonwealth of Pennsylvania.”_ It is my honor to continue fighting for racial equity in Pennsylvania, and I hope to take this fight to the US Senate. Yours, Sen. Sharif Street
---

name: Karen Bass
subject: Seen. Cherished. Proud.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Karen Bass for Congress |
body:
Happy Pride, friend!

I know that LGBTQ+ people -- especially people of color -- have been fierce fighters in our journey toward equality for every person. I've been proud to march with and fight beside LGBTQ+ activists for years.

One of the things that's too often overlooked is that the first Pride was a riot, friend. A demand for equality led by Black and brown activists. And that fight for dignity and justice continues in the present.

Transgender women of color face violence and discrimination at alarming levels across the country. Right now, GOP state lawmakers are launching bigoted and hateful attacks on the rights of transgender youth. And 40 percent of all homeless youth are LGBTQ+.

I'm standing in solidarity with the LGTBQ+ community against these atrocities. It's why I voted to pass the Equality Act to protect the rights and liberties of every American. And it's why I'm pushing for the passage of my bill, the George Floyd Justice in Policing Act, to reform our policing system to protect Black and brown LGBTQ+ people from violence and hate at the hands of the police.

No matter who you love, how you identify, whether you're out or waiting for now -- you are seen, you are loved, and you are a central part of our community here in the 37th District. I hope you have a safe, happy, and joyous Pride Month.

In solidarity,

Karen

---------------------------------------------
| Paid for by Karen Bass for Congress |
---------------------------------------------

Bass for Congress
918 Pennsylvania Ave SE
Washington, DC 20003 United States

name: Bobby Jindal
subject: Immigration Without Assimilation Is Just Invasion
body:
To begin to fix immigration, we must agree the American identity is worth preserving and then work to build an immigration system that nourishes it. [](http://links.americanxt.com/u/click?_t=45ea7b9dcedb45198104e7ca02a78270&_m=879de42fc59845eb9bfd03bef1401138&_e=YbbybDslGdqxzEWt9SBQPj13gT0TEL4PUnolqn8SgIRmKcq1mEcUBOqLS5aocu9tbx-UH-71eB9-R7Fy2aooe8m802rT77d7L0QTbwJ8uJo1KhMiIYkiUcbhlJwzbvVMWF5i4qlFdbqACZMvJOxBi-KuNtkem-_gQXOW9Ap6ILBURsz4lShLFXDmEb_JQqR1wvU-5ZQ4KrLwBg0WaEXsG1Ge4w7cRt6D6_ipq20jGo7_L_ZfJZ66IUO7m5qETIzYBh_z7uX1z5mMewfx8rWNDw%3D%3D) | |
---
**Immigration Without Assimilation Is Just Invasion**

By Bobby Jindal & Alex Castellanos
|
---
_To begin to fix immigration, we must agree the American identity is worth preserving and then work to build an immigration system that nourishes it._
|
---
Can Washington discuss immigration without devolving into a debate about racism? If we lay down our Twitter weapons, perhaps we could discuss what kind of immigration we need.

Should we allow anyone, from anywhere, to come here at any time? Amid the political establishment’s promotion of all immigration as virtuous and their relentless attacks on all things traditional or patriotic, we can demand something better: An immigration system that is good for America and requires that the immigrants we admit want to be Americans.

Immigration has long nourished our country. Our parents were immigrants, like those rooting nearly every American family tree, and we support legal immigration. Yet we also believe we ought to lock our national doors at night, not because we hate the people on the outside, but because we love the people on the inside.

We want to protect the nation we are blessed to share. Immigration is essential nourishment for our country but can be healthy or unhealthy, like nourishment for the body. We cannot consume all we want, whenever we want, without limit or discretion.

The most valuable resource on the planet is not mined underground, harvested from our oceans, or grown on the earth’s surface. It is the human resource, _people_ , and America needs an immigration strategy that competes for those who make us stronger. Even as global population growth slows, and some advanced nations like Japan and Italy struggle to hold steady, French President Emmanuel Macron and Canadian Prime Minister Justin Trudeau have tried to compete with America for scientists and technology workers.

Despite what conservatives hear on talk radio, our country may soon need to hang “help wanted” signs on our border, seeking a new generation of immigrants to refresh it. The trick is to make sure they contribute to, not erode, the America that attracts them. New American or old, we should all be required to support the freedoms and culture that light our gates...

_Read more_**[HERE](http://links.americanxt.com/u/click?_t=45ea7b9dcedb45198104e7ca02a78270&_m=879de42fc59845eb9bfd03bef1401138&_e=YbbybDslGdqxzEWt9SBQPoYdodLm5U1jFNLd6GA1laVej-6IAhhuES4CnnHyEdO4iHQIpcjpscxSn8MSMgq13b270pmEJ8W0B21E9fWJPliw1iRQeCZEYQJ4wfJIwAhshnmEAoT1c4-WchM7iVYm0HHBsv40U9K3UWzeDSkA5JAoNj6jLzmOTlBmfz2b-KDG39l2ZLTBqXoybkgGig9wMOVqgplwpJcejVYatXnvDACpmTrQGnDkYeHAgO6haj1apADMm152K5r0IUGffWOPCIaveLuCDZhzHTTrV4MrgM1ePYx4L8WxuHAEBt_4qAMmQrOP7e5n7vDc4oPqwVS0OssyJKLVcpqG4uWWYloktNs%3D)**.
|

name: Laura Loomer
subject: 2022 Game Plan
body:
When I filed to run for Congress again this year, I left open the possibility that I'd run in another district.
| | | [](https://deploy.libersend.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/rIEpbyQ7637H6LO2rZOOf62w/aqxhB3OUih6meAyvJCXsxw)
Patriot,

[](https://deploy.libersend.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/oV892ssbsehb6K2a5BjiuLIA/aqxhB3OUih6meAyvJCXsxw) When I filed to run for Congress again this year, I left open the possibility that I'd run in another district.

**Florida is gaining one new seat in Congress, and it WILL be a VACANT Republican seat.**

In 2020, I crushed the large primary field to win the Republican nomination, and regardless of where I end up running, that's the game plan for this race.

Once we win the primary, the path to Congress will be set and clear. Your girl is headed to Congress this time.

**But it will be a fight!**

[**Help me prepare for the primary by donating today.**](https://deploy.libersend.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/oV892ssbsehb6K2a5BjiuLIA/aqxhB3OUih6meAyvJCXsxw)

**The End of Quarter is coming up at the end of this month and I have to raise another $80,000 to be competitive.**

Make no mistake, the GOP Establishment is going to throw in a candidate to compete against me as they don't want another "trouble maker" in Congress.

So it's up to us to stop the Establishment from putting in a RINO to stop me.

[**Help me hit my fundraising goal by donating as much as you can below.**](https://deploy.libersend.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/oV892ssbsehb6K2a5BjiuLIA/aqxhB3OUih6meAyvJCXsxw)

Thanks so much!

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer

P.S. Absentee ballots for the primary will start mailing in about 400 days from now - but we won't know the district lines until AT LEAST late January. So we have to hit the ground with a MASSIVE campaign to get in front of 700,000 voters immediately. [**Donate here and help me win this!**](https://deploy.libersend.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/oV892ssbsehb6K2a5BjiuLIA/aqxhB3OUih6meAyvJCXsxw)

**Memo** : We need your immediate help to keep pace with my opponent and national democrats »

Peter,

The purpose of this email to inform you of the overall fundraising goal that we’ve set for the month of June. I have to admit to you, I’m a bit nervous we’re going to fail to reach our goals and I’m hoping you can help.

You see, **we only have 22 days left** until the end of the second fundraising quarter, which means we only have 22 days to hit our goal of raising $100,000 for the quarter. Reaching this fundraising milestone will qualify me for the National Republican Party’s “On the radar” program for promising candidates.

The most recent time that I checked the numbers (this morning) we are short $30,000. We’ve done the math and **[if everyone who has donated since I launched my campaign last makes an additional donation of $7, we would hit our goal easily.](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=d7534de79295475f8737fbdf6546e814&_e=sV8Xy9AsSLozR4FxTd0088uOK3rthe498HYtjSrR8BZFQljPhKPF-Xv_WTF54r4BlRWg0KdG2sSysOnYFuhJTe5lE_vVhN3m-CmcF7MNDfA5UjvGtnTmAceDMJbegmUrToXaFUKkvR2ubx2DBDqDpUCtym3_L-f0ZrF8IL78GUK__s7T5e0OTrKATsCMH7OuhBMNdpklrEem_Z-yjFRa1fgfOxUq7P25ZEtcOoJ2jTkf6IlPFQ6GPA8tnS8FAFV-qimumNbgbcj41HblrTvvby9kCoLz6Oiyh4uTx7Butvm6Ap2ZK7LffuJO11dsk9-HzLbT6X7v35YRNLAtEAi3-uJnHcaB7hwh-zETMlgvSlu4AMDqJ5fcZcH_RaXYPpmlVhquLxoFZZFNAfa-RKY1vH8XwC8ZOEMo5_Z4-k1-oXPOLQRfCZ4MJ-_x-3ChOe_Z)**

| _**PLEASE CHIP-IN[$7 OR MORE TODAY](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=d7534de79295475f8737fbdf6546e814&_e=sV8Xy9AsSLozR4FxTd0088uOK3rthe498HYtjSrR8BZFQljPhKPF-Xv_WTF54r4BlRWg0KdG2sSysOnYFuhJTe5lE_vVhN3m-CmcF7MNDfA5UjvGtnTmAceDMJbegmUrToXaFUKkvR2ubx2DBDqDpUCtym3_L-f0ZrF8IL78GUK__s7T5e0OTrKATsCMH7OuhBMNdpklrEem_Z-yjFRa1fgfOxUq7P25ZEtcOoJ2jTk2x-QqBKGvWrmoGQiYKrNL9bbfG3g9AYzzqBxQbQnyE-9NAVq6gIQWei8ZVhTtg2uvoVlFQWo_1XbHaEM6oufJbRFFqz1UiMshdhdVeUHvWo7uZDoXVCBH9Q0PDt0WaaEfGpzSdsfeVsYRIb-OMjspS0y-MPEwr7OMjlMjvts_dNdJslEGGagfoD1zvzgPXXCw5pRJHQcSiiAAuUHgetdD)** _

STATUS FOR dpwillis67@gmail.com: PENDING

[** HELP ME QUALIFY FOR "On the Radar" ➞ **](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=d7534de79295475f8737fbdf6546e814&_e=sV8Xy9AsSLozR4FxTd0088uOK3rthe498HYtjSrR8BZFQljPhKPF-Xv_WTF54r4BlRWg0KdG2sSysOnYFuhJTe5lE_vVhN3m-CmcF7MNDfA5UjvGtnTmAceDMJbegmUrToXaFUKkvR2ubx2DBDqDpUCtym3_L-f0ZrF8IL78GUK__s7T5e0OTrKATsCMH7OuhBMNdpklrEem_Z-yjFRa1fgfOxUq7P25ZEtcOoJ2jTnphkiMgo6SHwiogu0hblHeqWI-J-kCXoDzTjsKaMeZNtdxiqhdLviGKgYZCHepWscV_h2536fl6ehFTBNNxBVNBljG6t5SkG4DxIvPfszdH_Sm7uoJp7fic-Swd6OhFCdEcdL7MP7fd-HqlSloE4RV5_CHeqVfKpvNV6_ogiHFXXgL8dHkbnExW4NoZkQQleiXlp9SpGn9x-bbotSM8NvL)

We’re falling behind my Democrat opponent in overall donations

**Why It’s Important** : Democrats are showcasing their fundraising strength a full 1.5 years before the midterm election, and they’re funneling money to my opponent – **more than $100,000 already in small dollar contributions**

**My Ask:** Our total donations are down by more than 50% this quarter vs this time last year. **[We need your help today if we’re going to reach our fundraising goals by the time the quarter ends on June 30th](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=d7534de79295475f8737fbdf6546e814&_e=sV8Xy9AsSLozR4FxTd0088uOK3rthe498HYtjSrR8BZFQljPhKPF-Xv_WTF54r4BlRWg0KdG2sSysOnYFuhJTe5lE_vVhN3m-CmcF7MNDfA5UjvGtnTmAceDMJbegmUrToXaFUKkvR2ubx2DBDqDpUCtym3_L-f0ZrF8IL78GUK__s7T5e0OTrKATsCMH7OuhBMNdpklrEem_Z-yjFRa1fgfOxUq7P25ZEtcOoJ2jTlI5-7Vm4YBQQvAkWeNe5bWvas3ZLDzgopxoREFtosuMCZmytBQfyYDB9AEwOuHSyPCfrgNS-M1ODOxYw3PqO7G222yDeA0Auy1IxeKfpkDE3JmfmIhIac6sJGvLUWY1Ivs5lFdR9WWZboKP3h40tnHKeeOFgoB9LWvFAj5gFGqcFZhbFPy535nmq6Ph9T_ogB9j1K5kihxKRbdZZrP2F5i)**

Last quarter my Democrat opponent, Peter DeFazio, chairman of the House Transportation Committee – and **the man charged with making Biden’s $6 trillion budget a reality** – raised a full **43% more** than he did this time last year. That has my team on edge. Peter DeFazio knows what my team is capable of; he knows my team and I are focused and adept fundraisings, and he’s preparing early this time around. I’m **[calling on you for help today](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=d7534de79295475f8737fbdf6546e814&_e=sV8Xy9AsSLozR4FxTd0088uOK3rthe498HYtjSrR8BZFQljPhKPF-Xv_WTF54r4BlRWg0KdG2sSysOnYFuhJTe5lE_vVhN3m-CmcF7MNDfA5UjvGtnTmAceDMJbegmUrToXaFUKkvR2ubx2DBDqDpUCtym3_L-f0ZrF8IL78GUK__s7T5e0OTrKATsCMH7OuhBMNdpklrEem_Z-yjFRa1fgfOxUq7P25ZEtcOoJ2jTm2WmapR5g7MQVhFz562wHd25FU-NbhulWO7VxGVHMQsNUIa4rb5hwaZA8O8OX0ifyalz8uI9muMIDkEKa26FR5SVN2U5GXEnZ839t6xJsSCGSHaoIAF3lDidhDjQImdOgBBTAUaESNm2INm5cCpD1ibla3xQG40xsaQ_UbupwrPd9Vj7W5Vhr2Ll-od2Hjbf3QhxF6iMM6xLOUkaSHrQfK)** because our success is directly correlated with how much money we are able to raise.

We need to make sure that we do our part to add to the overall Republican donor total in Q2 (June 30th deadline).

**[In May, more than 4,000 conservatives made a donation to my campaign. It’s our goal to double that before the end of the month. I have to admit to you, I’m a bit nervous we’re going to fail to reach our goals and I’m hoping you can help. You see, we only have 22 days left until the end of the second fundraising quarter, which means we only have 22 days to hit our goal of raising $100,000 for the quarter. Reaching this fundraising milestone will qualify me for the National Republican Party’s “On the radar” program for promising candidates. The most recent time that I checked the numbers (this morning) we are short $30,000. We’ve done the math and | PLEASE CHIP-IN STATUS FOR dpwillis67@gmail.com: PENDING We’re falling behind my Democrat opponent in overall donations Why It’s Important : Democrats are showcasing their fundraising strength a full 1.5 years before the midterm election, and they’re funneling money to my opponent – more than $100,000 already in small dollar contributions My Ask: Our total donations are down by more than 50% this quarter vs this time last year. Last quarter my Democrat opponent, Peter DeFazio, chairman of the House Transportation Committee – and the man charged with making Biden’s $6 trillion budget a reality – raised a full 43% more than he did this time last year. That has my team on edge. Peter DeFazio knows what my team is capable of; he knows my team and I are focused and adept fundraisings, and he’s preparing early this time around. I’m because our success is directly correlated with how much money we are able to raise. We need to make sure that we do our part to add to the overall Republican donor total in Q2 (June 30th deadline). Thank you for your support and consideration. name: Malcolm Kenyatta
subject: Joe Manchin’s weak excuse
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Malcolm PAC
body:
#

Hey friend —
Just yesterday, Republicans in Harrisburg launched another attack on Pennsylvanians’ voting rights.
I fought back hard, but the truth is we need help from Washington to put an end to the GOP’s voter suppression tactics for good.
We can’t have a government that works for working people if we don’t put an end to the GOP’s voter suppression tactics.
So I’m disgusted to hear Senator Joe Manchin’s weak excuse for why he’s voting against the For the People Act.
Our democracy can’t afford another Democrat like Joe Manchin who will play right into the Republicans’ hands.
Pennsylvania’s next Senator must be someone who will act boldly to save our sacred democracy.
If I’m elected, I’ll fight tooth and nail to save our democracy — I won’t make weak excuses.
**But I need your help to get there. Our campaign has a big FEC deadline coming up, and we need a strong showing of grassroots support to prove we’ve got what it takes to win this race.**
[So please, friend, could you chip in $3 right now to fuel our fight to save our democracy? Anything you can contribute makes a big difference, especially this month.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30483632/289680570/-347207331?refcode2=bf96a079-a8c8-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&refcode=em210608-1-c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZjk2YTA3OS1hOGM4LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mbudAWq-sjrqTPjA1hfFvJ6BYGR5ChxYpXBl2s38Rzc=)
