name: Tiffany Shedd
subject: Biden's new nominee...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shedd for Attorney General
body:
Friends, As a gun owner, I’m concerned about Joe and Kamala’s attempts to trample on our Second Amendment rights. Now, Biden has tapped in a progressive to run the Bureau of Alcohol, Tobacco, and Firearms (ATF). Biden’s pick, David Chipman, _supports radical gun control by any means necessary._ _I own guns that Biden wants to make illegal . . . but I rely on my Second Amendment rights to protect my family._**_That’s why I’m fighting back._****_Can I count on your help to stop this attack on our rights?_** Biden’s gun-grab plan will erode our Constitutional rights, and I know Arizonans will fight back. As your next Attorney General, I’ll fight for our rights and work to **STOP** any gun-grab attempt. name: Patty Murray
subject: We need a federal public option (sign on now)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by People for Patty Murray
body:
Health care should be a right, not a privilege. This has always been true, but the pandemic has only made it even more clear. We must ensure that everyone -- no matter where they live, who they are, or how much money they make -- can get quality affordable health care.
#
Peter,
Health care should be a right, not a privilege. This has always been true, but the pandemic has only made it even more clear. We must ensure that everyone -- no matter where they live, who they are, or how much money they make -- can get quality affordable health care.
In the Senate, I’m working hard to make it happen. I’m taking bold action to lower health care costs and achieve universal coverage by laying the groundwork to establish a federal public option.
**[Do you support a federal public option? Add your name right now if you’re with me.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30484266/289682353/423343691?ms=pm_em_210608_1&refcode=pm_em_210608_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOTUyNzM4Ni1hYmM4LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=X9GR3b5Mupa7gQwoJdmogF9KjikH72qk-O3Fe43fbhk=&emci=0abfde55-9cc8-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=b9527386-abc8-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=13116610)**
Democrats have been working to make health care more affordable and ensure everyone has the coverage they need. We’ve made great strides, but we aren’t finished yet. Currently, I am working to gather ideas and input as we create comprehensive legislation in the Senate to help more people get covered.
Peter, I need supporters like you joining me and speaking out for a federal public option. I know that we can get this important goal across the finish line if we don’t give up on this fight.
**[Let’s dramatically expand coverage and reduce costs with a public option. Sign on now.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30484267/289682354/423343691?ms=pm_em_210608_1&refcode=pm_em_210608_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOTUyNzM4Ni1hYmM4LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=X9GR3b5Mupa7gQwoJdmogF9KjikH72qk-O3Fe43fbhk=&emci=0abfde55-9cc8-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=b9527386-abc8-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=13116610)**

clean_body: Health care should be a right, not a privilege. This has always been true, but the pandemic has only made it even more clear. We must ensure that everyone -- no matter where they live, who they are, or how much money they make -- can get quality affordable health care. Peter, Health care should be a right, not a privilege. This has always been true, but the pandemic has only made it even more clear. We must ensure that everyone -- no matter where they live, who they are, or how much money they make -- can get quality affordable health care. In the Senate, I’m working hard to make it happen. I’m taking bold action to lower health care costs and achieve universal coverage by laying the groundwork to establish a federal public option. Democrats have been working to make health care more affordable and ensure everyone has the coverage they need. We’ve made great strides, but we aren’t finished yet. Currently, I am working to gather ideas and input as we create comprehensive legislation in the Senate to help more people get covered. Peter, I need supporters like you joining me and speaking out for a federal public option. I know that we can get this important goal across the finish line if we don’t give up on this fight. Thank you, Patty Paid for by People for Patty Murray

Peter,

I voted "not guilty" in the Democrats' second impeachment of President Donald J. Trump just a few months ago.

The process was clearly unconstitutional and driven by liberal hatred. I was proud to lead the effort against this impeachment and work with President Trump to maintain his legacy.

If Senate Majority Leader Chuck Schumer's efforts to pass a radically liberal agenda weren't bad enough, this impeachment trial was yet another reminder that _it really matters who controls the United States Senate._

President Joe Biden, Speaker Nancy Pelosi, and Senator Schumer owe their positions to their despicable, coordinated, four-year attack of President Trump and his accomplishments.

**They certainly had accomplices.** The mainstream media attacked him daily, and Big Tech brazenly censored information that was damaging to Biden's campaign.

But that _still_ wasn't enough. The Democrats and the Radical Left owe their power to their hatred of President Trump. That's why they're continuing to fan those flames in their desperate bid to enact a dangerous socialist agenda.

**Their goal is to push through as much of this legislation as possible before the next election, when Republicans have a chance to regain control of the U.S. Senate.**

Peter, that is the purpose of this email to you today. You stood with me last year when I needed help. You helped me defeat an opponent who raised a record-shattering $132 million from more than a million donors across the nation.

That opponent - Jaime Harrison - has been appointed by President Biden to lead the Democratic National Committee, and he's already raising millions of dollars from his donors to help Chuck Schumer defend the razor-thin liberal majority in the Senate.

Our best hope for the future of this nation rests in our ability to stop them and return conservative leadership to the U.S. Senate. **Since Election Day, I've provided more than $5 million to the National Republican Senatorial Committee and Senate candidates to help win the majority - and I'm just getting started.**

Today I am launching the **RECLAIM THE MAJORITY** project to provide critical funding for the battleground Senate races that will help us win back a Republican majority in the U.S. Senate. **[Peter, will you help me fund this crucial effort by making an inaugural contribution of $10, $25, $50, $100 or more to help launch this new project?](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=2f1bd579cad44eada75ab2beba48e946&_e=c7ZNFdMyg4iBfPFIuw_Qoz-AtjnPyWeyPab5_L4N4JJG5TUdwxoko90cjpU3q2NioWLXncRvtDUpFWB8tTvKtZDmJKBvEJYZIE_phI3Rn3cJttCRaYDKrzGbB8Kd8Q5ddwPi9x1R3tq_6dX8CNY6ehEmzy8bc5ucUR2Ke_C-IAWI6gJtxoiTCIBXZRTWTxePKznZII-dlC49ZNAPDrJPC54zPuwY1JRv0CBdfR5ABgmZ5sP7__ThcmBIk0JaLVeRR3U021o-orx34qv5YxUN03l8jXPPqIMsmV8tllPEdSNCujHeNYtYVdnxQ-uLmjXQ2bWxRHzfm1aI3g7_b9XFgLav1kK9RDKxI4NqBkF6bmgwQYWhwCyt6XzUZv67lJeZQuq-0cZZBp2CKV6W7OdPYAwCZInNwycbbIRqpz6kOS8Fxwp9hTqT38rOAKAng79aEIPUbpYlFsJEK0EAMP0gj74SRdt0e-3wPFhapAIi898%3D)**

Folks like you helped me withstand an avalanche of attacks by the Radical Left last year. My goal is to provide that same early base of support to other candidates and help them shape their campaigns in opposition to the Democrats' disastrous agenda.

The last thing we could afford to do during a pandemic was intentionally kill tens of thousands of jobs, but that's _exactly_ what President Biden did on his first day in office by ending the Keystone Pipeline. President Biden's proposed income tax hike will strike directly at the middle class, damaging our jittery economy even further.

The Radical Left's plans to open our borders, defund local police departments, and give stimulus checks to illegal immigrants is a disaster-in-the-making.

Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez and her "Green New Deal" will devastate our agricultural economy and cause energy prices to skyrocket. Expanding the courts and packing them with liberal partisans will make a mockery of our judicial system. And the Democrats' desire to appease China, Iran, and other nations with malicious intentions will make the world more dangerous.

[**Reclaim The Majority ->**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=2f1bd579cad44eada75ab2beba48e946&_e=c7ZNFdMyg4iBfPFIuw_Qoz-AtjnPyWeyPab5_L4N4JJG5TUdwxoko90cjpU3q2NioWLXncRvtDUpFWB8tTvKtZDmJKBvEJYZIE_phI3Rn3cJttCRaYDKrzGbB8Kd8Q5ddwPi9x1R3tq_6dX8CNY6ehEmzy8bc5ucUR2Ke_C-IAWI6gJtxoiTCIBXZRTWTxePKznZII-dlC49ZNAPDrJPC54zPuwY1JRv0CBdfR5ABgmZ5sP7__ThcmBIk0JaLVeRR3U021o-orx34qv5YxUN03H2RdOtFhfMLpIHl-cuc5suXixx9JrO1M9AnXwJ8heX1U_f64E631eJiQj1SFX12Grb_HfCWRh3wXHfxFx359NE7vHk22tKYpsbdxE58qavegEkJSNRqpdj0bJrLADI6MQxbvh5wouWwlfb_-l43eljyn0cAVuzuU5PknomUpxRTfoWhbabcXEqTfagBTnoJSu_YH8uxNwRkl4utB7RziQ%3D)

clean_body: Electing a Republican majority to the U.S. Senate is our only way to stop Democrats from enacting their socialist agenda. Electing a Republican majority to the U.S. Senate is our only way to stop Democrats from enacting their socialist agenda. Will you stand with me to RECLAIM THE MAJORITY? | Peter, I voted "not guilty" in the Democrats' second impeachment of President Donald J. Trump just a few months ago. The process was clearly unconstitutional and driven by liberal hatred. I was proud to lead the effort against this impeachment and work with President Trump to maintain his legacy. If Senate Majority Leader Chuck Schumer's efforts to pass a radically liberal agenda weren't bad enough, this impeachment trial was yet another reminder that it really matters who controls the United States Senate. President Joe Biden, Speaker Nancy Pelosi, and Senator Schumer owe their positions to their despicable, coordinated, four-year attack of President Trump and his accomplishments. They certainly had accomplices. The mainstream media attacked him daily, and Big Tech brazenly censored information that was damaging to Biden's campaign. But that still wasn't enough. The Democrats and the Radical Left owe their power to their hatred of President Trump. That's why they're continuing to fan those flames in their desperate bid to enact a dangerous socialist agenda. Their goal is to push through as much of this legislation as possible before the next election, when Republicans have a chance to regain control of the U.S. Senate. Peter, that is the purpose of this email to you today. You stood with me last year when I needed help. You helped me defeat an opponent who raised a record-shattering $132 million from more than a million donors across the nation. That opponent - Jaime Harrison - has been appointed by President Biden to lead the Democratic National Committee, and he's already raising millions of dollars from his donors to help Chuck Schumer defend the razor-thin liberal majority in the Senate. Our best hope for the future of this nation rests in our ability to stop them and return conservative leadership to the U.S. Senate. Since Election Day, I've provided more than $5 million to the National Republican Senatorial Committee and Senate candidates to help win the majority - and I'm just getting started. Today I am launching the RECLAIM THE MAJORITY project to provide critical funding for the battleground Senate races that will help us win back a Republican majority in the U.S. Senate. | Folks like you helped me withstand an avalanche of attacks by the Radical Left last year. My goal is to provide that same early base of support to other candidates and help them shape their campaigns in opposition to the Democrats' disastrous agenda. The last thing we could afford to do during a pandemic was intentionally kill tens of thousands of jobs, but that's exactly what President Biden did on his first day in office by ending the Keystone Pipeline. President Biden's proposed income tax hike will strike directly at the middle class, damaging our jittery economy even further. The Radical Left's plans to open our borders, defund local police departments, and give stimulus checks to illegal immigrants is a disaster-in-the-making. Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez and her "Green New Deal" will devastate our agricultural economy and cause energy prices to skyrocket. Expanding the courts and packing them with liberal partisans will make a mockery of our judicial system. And the Democrats' desire to appease China, Iran, and other nations with malicious intentions will make the world more dangerous. My Republican colleagues and I are working to block as much of this as we can, but our best hope is to regain the majority in the next election through the RECLAIM THE MAJORITY project. Thanks, Lindsey Graham P.S. Peter, the Democrats know their control of the Senate is hanging by a thread. Electing a Republican majority to the U.S. Senate is our only way to stop them from enacting their socialist agenda. | | | ---|---|---|--- | Paid For By Team Graham, Inc. name: Patrick Leahy
subject: Which issues are most important to you right now?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Leahy for U
body:
This will only take a minute.

| [](https://links.e.leahyforvermont.) Friend, Last week, President Biden introduced his budget, prioritizing programs that invest in the success of every American as we communally recover from the pandemic. Budgets communicate our country's values, and they are a roadmap for which challenges the United States will prioritize in the years to come. I am thrilled to see that President Biden's budget includes money for many issues near and dear to me, including paid family leave, small business support, and increased health care for Americans. **But I want to hear from you directly: Which issues are most important to you right now? What do you want to see reflected in our country 's next budget? [Fill out this quick survey today to share your thoughts with me as I begin to work on next year's budget.](https://links.e.leahyforvermont.com/els/v2/k2_LcmwEvmQ6/blVJeDdrdXJKUy80bHdUdDExQmVMcU9qeW5PdVJnMlpaZVo2ZS9lZDlETWJ2ZXV3ZWs1WTNWY3U1a1BYa0Y3SmMzYlVpa2RQUG9oc1dXRjVaSi9lV2FETEJzd2hNTi9TOS84VWVsNldaZU09S0/b2J6TzAza25KWS9nWUhteGI3NncyOXo3TjE1N3loRzV4TGdFMkMrSXlFRFlYV2lmTHN3cFEyZWtBOVRRMTN2aHN6aGVqVGRpVWxYeGFSZ1cyZld4dnhDK1FaWHlYZHRVS0)** Thank you for sharing your thoughts and values with us. name: MarkKelly.com
subject: Real quick, friend
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
#

Friends — we’ll keep this brief.
[**Will you kick off the week with a $3 donation to our people-powered campaign? We’ll put your donation to work in our efforts to hold Arizona’s seat and keep Mark in the Senate.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-june21&amount=3&refcode=em210608-1-15?t=1&refcode2=752_6688874_h_lfAx&akid=752%2E6688874%2Eh_lfAx)
Last month, the National Republican Senatorial Committee and One Nation, a Mitch McConnell-backed Super PAC, both launched ads in Arizona attacking our campaign.
So it’s safe to say we can’t afford to get comfortable. National Republicans think they can take back this seat in 2022, and the fact that special interest groups are already lining up to defeat us means they are serious.
Mark needs our support to hold this seat and the best way we can do that is by making sure we have the resources to run another strong campaign and win a full six-year term to the Senate.
**Your support will go a long way, so please use the link below to make a donation today:**
[**https://act.markkelly.com/go/June-Goal**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-june21?refcode=em210608-1-15&t=2&refcode2=752_6688874_h_lfAx&akid=752%2E6688874%2Eh_lfAx)
Thank you for all that you do,
Team Kelly

Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.markkelly.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=3&akid=752%2E6688874%2Eh_lfAx).
Mark Kelly was a Captain in the U.S. Navy and astronaut. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or Department of Defense and reference to NASA does not imply endorsement by the National Aeronautics and Space Administration.

name: Patrick Morrisey
subject: Fighting Against Open Borders and the Deadly Drug Scourge
body:
| | | | Fentanyl is Pouring Into America...
---
---
Dear Peter,
Attorney General Patrick Morrisey appeared on America's Newsroom this morning and discussed how President Biden's failure to control the border crisis is making it easier for deadly fentanyl to flow across the Southern border and make its way to West Virginia and other states.
With fentanyl overdoses increasing year-over-year at a dramatic rate, Morrisey is pushing back against open-border policies and alerting our country to the growing drug trafficking of the Mexican drug cartels.

clean_body: | | | | Fentanyl is Pouring Into America... Dear Peter, Attorney General Patrick Morrisey appeared on America's Newsroom this morning and discussed how President Biden's failure to control the border crisis is making it easier for deadly fentanyl to flow across the Southern border and make its way to West Virginia and other states. With fentanyl overdoses increasing year-over-year at a dramatic rate, Morrisey is pushing back against open-border policies and alerting our country to the growing drug trafficking of the Mexican drug cartels. The Attorney General has been speaking out against Biden's immigration initiatives which seek to reverse years of progress made by the Trump Administration. Please enjoy the and an Thank you. Sincerely, Patrick Morrisey West Virginia Attorney General | Paid for by TEAM MORRISEY, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit of Morrisey for Attorney General, Morrisey for West Virginia, Inc., Morrisey 2020, Blue and Gold Fund, and West Virginia Republican Party, Inc. c/o Red Curve Solutions 138 Conant Street, 2nd Floor Beverly, MA 01915. subject: Defeat the seven Romneys
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DRAIN THE DC SWAMP PAC
body:
One was bad enough, but now we have SEVEN??? |
---
| | [ ](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=5203ed553f&e=ba6e67b849)
---
| | Hi Peter,

My name is Christopher Ekstrom, and I am the conservative businessman and donor with the DC Drain the Swamp PAC. We are America First patriots delivering accountability to Congress, [with your help](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=66ab1c94ef&e=ba6e67b849)!

**While we all know about the Liz Cheneys and Adam Kinzingers of the Swamp, we can't forget the selfish traitors on the other side of Capitol Hill.... the Senate.**

While we are thrilled the Senate acquitted President Trump, there were still seven traitor Republicans who did the wrong thing. _These people have the nerve to ask for our money and support at election time, but lack the spine to do the right thing when push comes to shove._

_Seven Republicans joined Democrats in voting to convict Trump, but support from 67 senators — or two-thirds of the chamber — would have been required for a conviction.

The Republicans in favor of conviction were: Bill Cassidy of Louisiana, Richard Burr of North Carolina, Susan Collins of Maine, Lisa Murkowski of Alaska, Mitt Romney of Utah, Ben Sasse of Nebraska and Pat Toomey of Pennsylvania._

No Democrats would ever do the same. They stand by their leaders, but our worthless RINO elected officials care about themselves only. Craven cowards.

Now, we already knew Romney and Murkowski were awful. Murkowski has never even earned 50% of the vote in her elections, and even lost the nomination in 2010. Romney is.... Romney. He had to move to Utah to find an election he could actually win.

_The rest of them have no excuse._

Sasse? Toomey? Burr? Cassidy? What the heck?

The problem of the RINOs in the Swamp may go a lot further than any of us knew.

_The Swamp that Trump went to drain extends to the U.S. Senate. We need to take out the Swampers so the rest fall in line._
---
| [ ](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=048edbbc9e&e=ba6e67b849)
---
| **There is only one thing the RINOs understand: losing. We need to hold them accountable.**

We hear that the Swamp is going to go all out to save these traitors. Murkowski is up this year, most of the rest in 2024.

_The lot of them will be scared to death after we take some electoral scalps... and that's where we need your help._
---
| [ ](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=faac554d01&e=ba6e67b849)
---
| **We need Republicans who will fight Democrats, not join them. We need America First patriots, and we clearly don't have that now! [Help us show them the light!](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=7575227be9&e=ba6e67b849)**

Swampers live to lie. We must punish their lies! [Your $35, $50, $100, $250, $500, or $1,000 donation is c](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=bc6e6b38f8&e=ba6e67b849)[rucial to holding the Senate accountable!](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=0a5a6c0982&e=ba6e67b849)

The Swamp never liked conservatives of principle. They distrust us, which is why they look down on us. Don't let them get away with it!

[Donate now.](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=4adb565ccc&e=ba6e67b849)

Respectfully,
---
| [ ](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=df6d482486&e=ba6e67b849)
---
| Christopher Ekstrom
Businessman
America First Donor

P.S. Much to my personal shame there were TWO TEXANS who voted wrong: Rep. VAN TAYLOR of TX-03 & Rep. Tony Gonzales of TX-23. There is no excuse for these two RINO SWAMP creatures to be returned to Congress. Help me return Taylor & Gonzales to private life in ‘22!
P.P.S. We must defeat these RINOs! [Donate right now to help us defeat them.](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=95205fc13d&e=ba6e67b849)

subject: WE HAVEN’T HEARD FROM YOU ON TRUMP’S SOCIAL MEDIA!

The second bill I co-sponsored as a member of Congress was the _Paycheck Fairness Act_. That was back in 2009. Today we had the chance to pass this bill in the Senate. We had a chance to finally secure equal pay for women. Instead, Republicans filibustered it — blocking it from proceeding to a vote. This is unacceptable, folks. The concept here is pretty simple: **Women deserve equal pay.** But Senate Republicans have become so disconnected from the lives of American workers and families, they don’t even see — or care — about the impacts of unequal pay in their home states. _**The filibuster means their callous disregard blocks all of us from addressing pay inequities, and the impacts, we know exist.**_ **We can’t let the Republican minority block progress. Today it’s on equal pay. Next it’s on campaign finance reform. Will you send a donation to my campaign so I can keep fighting to abolish the filibuster and secure equal pay for equal work?** _If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [$10 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30487584/289698892/-1385525816?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=MTH_em_20210608_X_FR_EP_X_ACT_US_all_all_EP_MTH_v1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNWRkMDAwNS1iOWM4LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kPoPMC5FbX-8tjRSef8RxS3vmQNH9qtCKA13U_RKY5o=) | [$25 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30487585/289698893/-1385525816?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=MTH_em_20210608_X_FR_EP_X_ACT_US_all_all_EP_MTH_v1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNWRkMDAwNS1iOWM4LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kPoPMC5FbX-8tjRSef8RxS3vmQNH9qtCKA13U_RKY5o=)

In New Mexico, on average, women earn 22 cents less per dollar than men. The pay gap is even worse for women of color. It’s not just unbelievable; it’s unacceptable.
The _Paycheck Fairness Act_ would build on the _Equal Pay Act_. It would help women challenge pay discrimination and hold employers accountable for pay disparities.
It’s become painfully clear that abolishing the filibuster is our only path to passing important policies like this bill.
**Please consider a donation of any amount so I can keep up my work to abolish the filibuster once and for all and ensure women are paid equally:**

But Senate Republicans have become so disconnected from the lives of American workers and families, they don’t even see — or care — about the impacts of unequal pay in their home states. The filibuster means their callous disregard blocks all of us from addressing pay inequities, and the impacts, we know exist. We can’t let the Republican minority block progress. Today it’s on equal pay. Next it’s on campaign finance reform. Will you send a donation to my campaign so I can keep fighting to abolish the filibuster and secure equal pay for equal work? If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = In New Mexico, on average, women earn 22 cents less per dollar than men. The pay gap is even worse for women of color. It’s not just unbelievable; it’s unacceptable. The Paycheck Fairness Act would build on the Equal Pay Act. It would help women challenge pay discrimination and hold employers accountable for pay disparities. It’s become painfully clear that abolishing the filibuster is our only path to passing important policies like this bill. Please consider a donation of any amount so I can keep up my work to abolish the filibuster once and for all and ensure women are paid equally: If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = To build a better economy for all New Mexicans, we need to build a more equitable economy — one that values the work of men and women equally. Let’s work together to make it happen. —Martin | Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate Senator Martin Heinrich is committed to helping New Mexico become a leader in defense, tech, and energy with opportunities in every corner. If you would like to stay in touch but receive fewer emails from us, . If you would like to unsubscribe from emails altogether, . Martin Heinrich for Senate PO Box 25763 Albuquerque, NM 87125 United States

As Virginia’s next Governor, I want to create great paying jobs, reduce health care costs, and build the best education system in the country. That’s my mission. That’s why I’m running.

My opponent, Glenn Youngkin? He says he’s running for Donald Trump. Trump knows this -- that’s why he gave Glenn his “complete and total endorsement.”

It’s no mystery why Trump endorsed Glenn. Trump’s lies and conspiracy theories that Joe Biden and Democrats stole the election are a central part of Youngkin’s campaign.

Youngkin wants to ban abortion and put more guns on our streets. He even brags about vacationing with Ted Cruz and says he opposes Medicaid expansion in Virginia.

So this is no joke, Derek. Glenn Youngkin is a billionaire extremist. If he buys the Governor’s office, he’ll roll back all of Virginia’s hard won progress. A Youngkin win in 2021’s most important race would tighten Donald Trump’s grip over the Republican Party. Extremists on the far-right all over our country would be emboldened.

So it’s critical for Democrats to come together and stop them. And the best way to do that is by building the biggest small dollar fundraising operation in the history of Virginia politics.

**[I need you, Derek. Will you join our team by donating anything you can afford right now?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30487718/289700506/-2023814932?refcode=20210608_TM_6X&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYzdjMjk1NC1iOWM4LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jsx7-ukgP9sctLQisEjbVT8ueTf0BVpdNMfNd-6YTm8=)**

Game on!

Terry

I’m trying to bring common sense and idiot control to the U.S. Senate, but Chuck Schumer isn’t making that job easy. **But with your help, we might be able to get through to a few of these Democrats.**

clean_body: Please Open | Folks, I wanted to touch base with my top supporters and let them know that I will be seeking re-election for the U.S. Senate in 2022. Watch Announcement Video Below Representing the people of Louisiana and the United States has been such an amazing privilege and one of the most important things I’ve done in my life, just below being a father and a husband to my wife and son. | I’m looking forward to getting back on the campaign trail and meeting with my constituents about the issues that matter most.What you hear in town isn’t what you see or hear up in Washington D.C., that’s for certain! I’m trying to bring common sense and idiot control to the U.S. Senate, but Chuck Schumer isn’t making that job easy. But with your help, we might be able to get through to a few of these Democrats. Chip in whatever you can. I can promise you it’ll go towards helping me Take Back the Senate and defend conservatives across the country. Thank you and God Bless, Senator John Kennedy Paid for by John Kennedy for Us John Kennedy for Us P.O. Box 80418 Baton Rouge, LA 70808 If you would like to send donation by mail,

name: Jayapal HQ
subject: Did you see this reporting in the New York Times?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
#
Peter, did you see Pramila’s urgent email?
Nearly 70% of Americans support the For the People Act, including a majority of Republicans! Yet, Joe Manchin still believes that the pursuit of Republican votes in the Senate is more important than protecting voting rights — and our democracy.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20210608?refcode=em20210608-355&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&refcode2=355_420207_E1I6EM&akid=355%2E420207%2EE1I6EM)
We’ve had enough, and we agree with Pramila: **It’s our popular agenda OR the filibuster. There’s no way around it.**
It’s time to eliminate the filibuster, pass the For the People Act, and deliver for the millions of voters who delivered us the White House, the Senate, and the House. [**If you agree, rush a $3 donation today to fuel our urgent fight to end the filibuster, pass the For The People Act, and protect our democracy ASAP.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20210608?refcode=em20210608-355&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&refcode2=355_420207_E1I6EM&akid=355%2E420207%2EE1I6EM)
Team Jayapal
\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Pramila Jayapal
Date: Mon, June 7, 2021
Subject: My response (Joe Manchin)
Peter,
Senator Joe Manchin announced yesterday that he would vote AGAINST historic voting rights legislation AND oppose ending the filibuster so we can deliver for the people. He is putting the idea of bipartisanship — which Republicans have long abandoned — ahead of passing the For The People Act and protecting our democracy.
With Republicans passing dozens of coordinated voter suppression efforts in states across the country and doing everything they can to make it harder for people to vote, we can’t stop fighting to protect our democracy.
[**That’s why I’m asking: Do you agree with Joe Manchin or will you make a donation today to support my work to pass the For The People Act, end the filibuster, and preserve our democracy?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20210608?refcode=em20210608-355&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&refcode2=355_420207_E1I6EM&akid=355%2E420207%2EE1I6EM)
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20210608?refcode=em20210608-355&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&refcode2=355_420207_E1I6EM&akid=355%2E420207%2EE1I6EM)**
From Georgia and Texas to Florida and states across America, Republicans are working overtime to restrict the right to vote. There is a clear, urgent, and popular solution: Passing the For the People Act. But we only have a few months to get it done in time for the 2022 elections. And with Joe Manchin, the filibuster, and Trump-Republicans in our way, we must put the pressure on right now.
Voters delivered us the House, the Senate, and the White House. Now, we must do everything in our power to protect voting rights — and our democracy. **It’s clear: Senate Democrats MUST pass the For the People Act. Let’s build the grassroots movement to make it happen before it’s too late.**
[**Chip in an urgent donation of $3 or more today to fuel our fight to end the filibuster and pass the critical For The People Act. We don’t have time to waste.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20210608?refcode=em20210608-355&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=41&refcode2=355_420207_E1I6EM&akid=355%2E420207%2EE1I6EM)
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20210608?refcode=em20210608-355&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=42&refcode2=355_420207_E1I6EM&akid=355%2E420207%2EE1I6EM)**
In solidarity,
Pramila

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20210608-355-footer&t=43&refcode2=355_420207_E1I6EM&akid=355%2E420207%2EE1I6EM)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.

_Friend ー it’s Darin LaHood._

_I can’t believe what’s happening to our country right now._

_We’re witnessing the_ _**_destruction of the American economy_**_ _, the_ _**_devaluing of the American Dollar_**_ _,__and_ _**_the decline of the American Family!_**_

_We need to reverse course on this downfall of America. We must take our country back, and there’s only one way to do that. _

After a hard-fought primary, Virginia Democrats have given us an overwhelming stamp of approval.** Our message was simple: after 8 years of achieving unprecedented progress for Virginians, experience and results matter. With Trump out of the White House, and Democratic Majorities all across the Commonwealth, there is so much more progress we can achieve, protecting and expanding rights for all Virginians. Without the support of our tireless supporters like you, this wouldn’t have been possible. I’d like to take a moment right at the top to acknowledge Delegate Jay Jones. Jay raised important issues and spoke passionately about racial justice. We’ll need his voice in the General Assembly, and I look forward to working with him as we continue to build a more perfect Commonwealth. I’d also like to congratulate Terry McAuliffe and Hala Ayala, and acknowledge the courage and hard work of all the candidates who put themselves forward this year for statewide office. This many great candidates is a sign of a healthy party, and that our ideas and values are resonating with Virginians. We can’t go back to a time when Virginia’s Attorney General stood against its voters on issues of access to healthcare, marriage equality, clean air and water, and immigrant rights. We cannot let politicians in Virginia pit us against each other. This office will not roll back the clock on civil rights for all of us, or let giant corporations dictate what’s best for our communities. **We’ve got to win in November.** But the fight won’t be easy -- tonight we take a breath, but we can’t take a break. I want to thank my kids and my wife Laura, my rock and my biggest supporter through 20 years of public service, my friends Rep. Gerry Connolly and Rep. Don Beyer, Senator Louise Lucas, Speaker Eileen Filler-Corn, Majority Leader Charniele Herring, Shannon Taylor, and so many other local leaders that I couldn’t name them all here, every Democratic attorney general in the nation, my campaign manager Farah and our entire team of interns, consultants and staff who got us through the finish line. But most of all, I’d like to thank you, friends. This was only possible because of you! Our next fight is to defeat a pro-NRA, anti-healthcare, anti-choice and anti-civil rights extremist who wants to roll back our progress. body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30489602/289717799/40582973?refcode=hla-em-210608-results&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODk2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOGFjZDRlMy1jNWM4LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=t9aeTTda5ahC7uvvVOetF7WCt8c9xlYVQx1-TH9gXaU=&emci=4a017f95-b4c8-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=d8acd4e3-c5c8-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=18668076)

Peter, we did it. Never in our 400 year history has Virginia elected a woman of color to statewide office — tonight, we’ve come that much closer. **I am so proud to be your Democratic nominee for Lieutenant Governor. Before I go any further, I have to ask:[Can I count on you to become a founding donor and help us continue building on our momentum as we head into the general election? You can chip in to our historic campaign right here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30489603/289717800/-1679821363?refcode=hla-em-210608-results&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODk2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOGFjZDRlMy1jNWM4LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=t9aeTTda5ahC7uvvVOetF7WCt8c9xlYVQx1-TH9gXaU=)** When you live a life of struggle — losing a father to gun violence, surviving childbirth only thanks to Medicaid, struggling to put food on my family’s table and a roof over our heads — it puts things in perspective. That’s why I worked tirelessly in the House of Delegates with my colleagues to expand Medicaid for more than 500,000 Virginians, raise teacher pay, ratify the Equal Rights Amendment, and more. **But we still have so much work to do. And make no mistake, Republicans like Winsome Sears will do anything to roll back the progress we’ve made.** Sears and her running mates have repeatedly advocated to strip Virginians of their voting rights, defund our public school system, and gut affordable health care for more than half a million Virginians — including stripping protections for folks with pre-existing conditions. We simply cannot afford to have an anti-democracy, pro-Trump Lieutenant Governor. Virginia families need a Lieutenant Governor who will build bridges instead of barriers to progress, someone who understands their struggles, and someone who can build on the progress we’ve made so far to make our Commonwealth a better place for all of us. **I am that candidate, and as Lieutenant Governor, I will be a leader for all Virginians, no matter who you are, who you love, who you pray to, or what side of the aisle you stand on.** Tonight, I became the Democratic nominee for Lt. Governor. Tomorrow, the attacks start coming. The GOP will throw every dirty trick in the book at us and we need to be prepared for anything. **So, I’m asking you to become a founding donor as we reach a turning point in this election. name: Moms for Katie Porter
subject: No discount for single parents
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MOMS IN OFFICE
body:
Single parents are just as deserving of the full child tax credit as married couples. Sign the pledge today to help us bring more fairness to the tax code. Take Action now on this important issue. [**ADD YOUR NAME**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/30490141/289718786/-1207160176?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4MjY1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImMyZGQ4NGMxLWM5YzgtZWIxMS1hN2FkLTUwMWFjNTdiOGZhNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=cUV3STsD8qNVSPXu6AcAUND19hTfpCvcybnhh8OYags=&emci=5c6571e1-c0c8-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=c2dd84c1-c9c8-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=2884131) | |
---
Hi Peter,

As a single mother of an 11-year-old boy, I know firsthand that raising a child costs just as much for single parents as it does for families with two or more caregivers. Under the current Child Tax Credit, however, married parents get more help to provide their children with food, childcare, housing, and health care.

[**Katie Porter is right--there’s no discount for single parents at grocery stores, child-care centers or doctors’ offices, yet the child tax credit gives less help to single parent families.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/30490142/289718787/-1207160176?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4MjY1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImMyZGQ4NGMxLWM5YzgtZWIxMS1hN2FkLTUwMWFjNTdiOGZhNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=cUV3STsD8qNVSPXu6AcAUND19hTfpCvcybnhh8OYags=&emci=5c6571e1-c0c8-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=c2dd84c1-c9c8-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=2884131)

That's why she introduced the Single Parent Penalty Elimination Act--in partnership with Congresswoman Ayanna Pressley and Congressman Don Beyer--to make it easier for single parents to access the financial relief they need to get through this economic crisis.

[**Will you join Katie Porter and me in the fight to end the single parent penalty by SIGNING your name HERE?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/30490143/289718788/-1207160176?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4MjY1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImMyZGQ4NGMxLWM5YzgtZWIxMS1hN2FkLTUwMWFjNTdiOGZhNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=cUV3STsD8qNVSPXu6AcAUND19hTfpCvcybnhh8OYags=&emci=5c6571e1-c0c8-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=c2dd84c1-c9c8-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=2884131)

Across our country today, millions of single parents are leading households and 81% of them are women—single mothers like myself. **It's time for our tax code to treat single and married families equally.**

The Single Parent Penalty Elimination Act recognizes that single parents are just as deserving of the full credit as married couples and it would bring more fairness to the tax code.

**[Will you join me, Katie Porter and thousands of grassroots supporters to help us eliminate the single parent penalty by adding your name today?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/30490144/289718789/-1207160176?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4MjY1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImMyZGQ4NGMxLWM5YzgtZWIxMS1hN2FkLTUwMWFjNTdiOGZhNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=cUV3STsD8qNVSPXu6AcAUND19hTfpCvcybnhh8OYags=&emci=5c6571e1-c0c8-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=c2dd84c1-c9c8-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=2884131)**

Thank you for all that you do.

Simona Grace,

Founder and Executive Director
Moms in Office

From: **Mike Pompeo**

Subject: **It 's Mike Pompeo. Leadership asked me to check in on you, Fellow Conservative.**

**FROM THE DESK OF
70TH UNITED STATES SECRETARY OF STATE
MIKE POMPEO**

This mission is of singular importance, Fellow Conservative, and without your immediate support, we're guaranteed to fall short.

4. Walking shoulder to shoulder with law enforcement.

Fellow Conservative,

I’m reaching out to you today to formally introduce myself and fill you in on my big announcement. My name is Major General Michael "Mick" McGuire, USAF (Ret.) and I’m a husband, a father, and a proud Arizonan.

Today, I am formally announcing my campaign for the U.S. Senate seat in Arizona.
